He soon unites his friends and enemies, and they become knights who join forces with the legendary wizard Merlin. Together, they must save mankind from the wicked enchantress Morgana and her army of supernatural warriors.

programme.title: The Book of Life
programme.desc: In the Mexican town of San Angel, Manolo (Diego Luna), Maria (Zoë Saldana) and Joaquin (Channing Tatum) have been friends ever since childhood. Although their lives have taken different paths -- Maria was sent to Europe, Joaquin joined the military, and Manolo studied to become a bullfighter -- one thing remains the same: Manolo and Joaquin both want to marry Maria. Little does the trio know that battling husband-and-wife deities have made a high-stakes wager on the love triangle's outcome.

programme.title: Squad Car
programme.desc: An accused man (Don Marlowe) helps a policeman (Paul Bryar) investigate an airplane mechanic's death and a counterfeit racket.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: In this musical comedy version of Alexandre Dumas' timeless novel, D'Artagnan (Don Ameche), a French peasant with dreams of joining the Musketeers, sets out for Paris. On the road, he comes across the three warriors. Athos (Douglas Dumbrille) challenges D'Artagnan to a duel, but eventually all four become fast friends. The Musketeers make an ally of the Queen of France (Gloria Stuart) and find themselves constantly dueling with the wicked Milady De Winter (Binnie Barnes).

programme.title: The Lodger
programme.desc: In London in 1889, retiree Robert Burton (Cedric Hardwicke) and his wife, Ellen (Sara Allgood), rent a spare room to the mysterious Slade (Laird Cregar) as Jack the Ripper continues to terrorize the city. The Burtons' niece, Kitty (Merle Oberon), is a music hall singer who initially grows fond of the eccentric lodger, but, when the Ripper's body count rises, she and a Scotland Yard inspector (George Sanders) gradually begin to suspect that Slade could be the notorious Whitechapel killer.

programme.title: The Innocents
programme.desc: Based on the Henry James story "The Turn of the Screw," a psychological thriller about a woman who takes a governess job for two orphans in a Victorian home. She begins to see what she believes are ghosts and suspects the children's bizarre behavior is the result of supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Alligator People
programme.desc: Newly married nurse Joyce Webster (Beverly Garland) doesn't know what to think when her husband, Paul (Richard Crane), disappears during a train ride. She hires private investigators and eventually tracks him to an old bayou plantation, where the owner (Frieda Inescort) insists she's never heard of Paul. Joyce sticks around anyway and soon learns that local doctor Mark Sinclair (George Macready) has been using a life-altering alligator serum on the town's residents, and that Paul is among them.

programme.title: Witchcraft
programme.desc: For generations, the Whitlocks and the Laniers have been feuding, including when Vanessa Whitlock (Yvette Rees), accused of being a witch, was buried alive centuries ago. Now Bill Lanier (Jack Hedley) wants to dig up a burial ground for development purposes, and Morgan Whitlock (Lon Chaney Jr.) tries to stop him. Soon, unexplainable accidents start to happen to members of the Lanier family, throwing suspicion on Morgan. The real truth Bill discovers is much more sinister than he expected.

programme.title: The Fury
programme.desc: When a devious plot separates CIA agent Peter Sandza (Kirk Douglas) from his son, Robin (Andrew Stevens), the distraught father manages to see through the ruse. Taken because of his psychic abilities, Robin is being held by Ben Childress (John Cassavetes), who is studying people with supernatural powers in hopes of developing their talents as weapons. Soon Peter pairs up with Gillian (Amy Irving), a teen who has telekinesis, to find and rescue Robin.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: After the death of her mother and having no other known relatives, Evie takes a DNA test and discovers a long-lost cousin she never knew she had. Invited by her newfound family to a lavish wedding in the English countryside, Evie's at first seduced by the sexy aristocratic host. However, she's soon thrust into a nightmare of survival as she uncovers twisted secrets about her family history and the unsettling intentions behind their sinful generosity.

programme.title: Thanksgiving
programme.desc: A mysterious masked maniac terrorizes residents of Plymouth, Mass., one year after a Black Friday riot ended in tragedy. Picking off victims one by one, the seemingly random revenge killings soon become part of a larger, sinister plan.

programme.title: The Menu
programme.desc: Shocking surprises await a couple when they travel to a coastal island to sample a chef's lavish menu at an exclusive restaurant.

programme.title: Holmes And Watson
programme.desc: A humorous take on Arthur Conan Doyle's classic mysteries featuring Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson.

programme.title: The House Next Door 2: Meet The Blacks
programme.desc: When best selling author Carl Black moves his family back to his childhood home, he must team up with oddball neighbors to do battle with a pimp, who may or may not be an actual vampire.

programme.title: Loverboy
programme.desc: When it comes to romance, Patrick Dempsey delivers in this madcap comedy. Working his way through college as a pizza delivery boy, Dempsey learns a few lessons in love from bored housewives who are looking for more than anchovies on their pizza.

programme.title: The Three Stooges (B&W Shorts)
programme.sub-title: Oily To Bed, Oily To Rise
programme.desc: The Stooges are tramps looking for handouts. Although the boys are down and out, Curly seems to get everything he wishes for. After some trouble with a farmer, the boys come across an abandoned car, one of Curly's wishes. The car actually belongs to some con men who have just gypped the widow Jenkins out of her land. The boys wind up at the Mrs. Jenkins house just in time for a free meal. To repay Mrs. Jenkins the boys try to fix her well and instead unleash an oil geyser. Learning that Mrs. Jenkins has been swindled, the boys go to retrieve the deed before it can be recorded. They find the bad guys and after a wild fight recover the deed. The boys return the deed to Mrs. Jenkins and marry her daughters; April, May and June.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely horrible team so they'll lose and she can move the team. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a purposely horrible team so they'll lose and she can move the team. But when the plot is uncovered, they start winning just to spite her.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop

Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop 2
programme.desc: After six years of keeping our malls safe, Paul Blart (Kevin James) has earned a vacation. He heads to Vegas with his teenage daughter and finds that safety never takes a holiday. When duty calls, Blart answers.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: Think Like A Man
programme.desc: Four friends conspire to turn the tables on their women when they discover the ladies have been using Steve Harvey's relationship advice against them.

programme.title: Joe Dirt (2001)
programme.desc: Jeers turn to cheers when a hard luck but plunky itinerant janitor becomes an unlikely hero.

programme.title: Punch-drunk Love
programme.desc: Barry Egan (Adam Sandler), the owner of a struggling vanity plungers company, falls in love with Lena Leonard (Emily Watson), a woman his sister is trying to set him up with. On the run from a gang of thugs, Barry travels to Hawaii, using the frequent flier mile coupons clipped from several cartons of pudding cups, to meet up with this girl of his dreams.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: A dog travels 400 miles in search of her owner.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: A 13-year girl who dreams of being popular locks herself in a closet after a humiliating experience. When she finally emerges, she finds herself just shy of her 30th birthday, looking fabulous and extremely popular.

programme.title: Whatever It Takes (2000)
programme.desc: Best friends and neighbors, Ryan Woodman and Maggie Carter, are four weeks away from the prom, and they've agreed to go together if they don't have real dates. Then Chris, a cool guy from the football team, offers to help Ryan connect with Ashley, a popular blond. In exchange, a la Cyrano, Chris needs Ryan's help to get close to Maggie. Ryan makes the deal, helps the dastardly Chris play Maggie, takes advantage of Ashley's lack of self-esteem, loses his values, makes fun of his geeky friends, and falls in Maggie's estimation. Maggie is fooled by Chris, poised to be his next score. Before prom night is over, with its Titanic theme, will Ryan stop sinking?

programme.title: A Dog's Way Home
programme.desc: A dog travels 400 miles in search of her owner.

programme.title: 13 Going On 30
programme.desc: A 13-year girl who dreams of being popular locks herself in a closet after a humiliating experience. When she finally emerges, she finds herself just shy of her 30th birthday, looking fabulous and extremely popular.

programme.title: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: When unproduced Broadway playwright Skip Donahue (Gene Wilder) and his best friend, out-of-work actor Harry Monroe (Richard Pryor), are both fired from their dead-end jobs, they abandon Broadway and set out in their battered van to find fame and fortune in Hollywood. But the van breaks down on the way, and they're forced to take jobs as dancing woodpeckers in a bank promotion. Their troubles are just beginning, as their feathered costumes are swiped by a pair of hoods who use them in a holdup, and Skip and Harry are soon carted off to prison. There they try to keep their sanity and their lives as they deal with a sadistic warden, a hulking mass-murderer and the inter-prison rodeo, which may provide them with the opportunity to walk away -- but at a considerable sacrifice.

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A romantically challenged morning show producer is reluctantly embroiled in a series of outrageous tests by her chauvinistic correspondent, host of a TV segment titled "The Ugly Truth," to prove his theories on relationships and help her find love. His clever ploys, however, lead to an unexpected result.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts
programme.desc: When a public romance turns into a private breakup, only a press agent and an assistant can help.

programme.title: Death At A Funeral
programme.desc: A funeral ceremony turns into a debacle of misplaced cadavers and family secrets.

programme.title: Rough Night
programme.desc: Five friends get a beach house in Miami for a wild bachelorette weekend that goes completely off the rails.

programme.title: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: The all-star comedy cast from "Grown Ups" returns with some exciting new additions!

programme.title: Stripes (1981)
programme.desc: Bill Murray and Harold Ramis as bootcamp flatfoots who join the Army to meet girls and actually succeed. Mud wrestling will never be the same.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: Pixels
programme.desc: An unlikely group of former '80s video game champions step up to save the world from an alien invasion in this visually spectacular action-adventure.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Roger is to have an operation. After telling Jeannie he always wanted to be a surgeon, Tony finds himself masked and gowned in the operating room.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Tony insists that Jeannie stop waiting on him. Jeannie takes the sacred oath of the genies to refuse any further request for help he might make.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Tony and Roger decide to go to Reno. Roger's vision of becoming a multimillionaire with Jeannie's help disappears when Tony tells him Jeannie is not going with them.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Tony, accompanied by Jeannie, goes to the golf course to deliver some documents to General Peterson.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Jeannie is disappointed that Tony has never asked for anything big, like a yacht.

programme.desc: The astronauts paint pictures to be auctioned off at the Air Force Benefit Show.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Nostalgia grips Jeannie when she learns the local museum is showing an exhibit from Bukistan, her old home.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Tony is assigned to assure Princess Tarji a good time during her three-day visit to the country, since the US is anxious to make a deal for oil with her father, the Shah of Pakuait.

programme.title: I Dream Of Jeannie (Colorized)
programme.desc: Jeannie brings dinner to Tony's office. Overhearing Tony and Jeannie late at night, Dr. Bellows tells General Peterson Tony is having an orgy.

programme.sub-title: I'll Never Forget What's Her Name
programme.desc: Tony receives a letter asking him to escort Miss Gordon around Cocoa Beach.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Jeannie wants to celebrate the first anniversary of meeting Tony on the desert island where they met. Preparing for a space flight, Tony forgets the date. Annoyed, Jeannie makes his capsule land on the island where Tony finds a bottle.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Tony tells Jeannie it's too bad every day can't be Sunday. Feeling Tony is overworked, Jeannie blinks and it becomes Sunday. She tells a horrified Tony it will be Sunday until he is rested.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: While Tony is at the Base, Harry Huggins comes to his nose. He tells Jeannie the house is tiny and the furniture shoddy. To impress him, Jeannie blinks and turns the house into a luxurious mansion, with world famous art works, a safe full of money and a staff of servants.

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Tony tells Jeannie he enjoys cold weather. She starts a snowstorm and the flakes fall on Dr. Bellows. Determined to discover the explanation for the strange happenings around Tony, Dr. Bellows tells Gen. Peterson

programme.title: I Dream of Jeannie
programme.desc: Tony strains his eyes while studying for a sub-orbital flight. Dr. Bellows orders him to take an eye test the following morning. Tony emphatically turns down Roger's suggestion that he get Jeannie's help in passing the examination.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Flatliners (1990)
programme.desc: Kiefer Sutherland and Julia Roberts lead a talented group of medical students on a dangerous journey to the other side of death... and back.

programme.title: Searching (2018)
programme.desc: 37 hours after David Kim's (John Cho) 16-year-old daughter goes missing without a single lead, David decides to search the one place no one has looked yet, where all secrets are kept today: his daughter's laptop.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: Faster
programme.desc: An ex-con sets out to avenge his brother's death after they were double-crossed during a heist years ago. During his campaign, however, he's tracked by a veteran cop and an egocentric hit man.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: The Legend Of Zorro (2005)
programme.desc: A threat to California's pending statehood causes Alejandro de la Vega to take action.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: Proud Mary
programme.desc: A hit woman's life is turned completely around when she meets a young boy who awakens in her a maternal instinct she never knew she had.

programme.title: Eight Millimeter
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage is a private detective hired to investigate the source of a crudely shot eight millimeter film. The investigation sends him down a gritty and frightening path into society's darkest corners.

programme.title: Get Carter
programme.desc: A Las Vegas mob enforcer travels back to his hometown to investigate his brother's mysterious death.

programme.title: Underworld: Blood Wars
programme.desc: The fifth installment of the Underworld franchise.

programme.title: Dragon Wars
programme.desc: Meet Buraki, the vicious, 200-meter long Imoogi serpent from ancient Korea. His army includes giant lizards with missile launchers, flying dragons, soldiers bred for evil and mega-intelligent dinosaurs. Together, they will destroy Los Angeles and possibly the world unless reincarnated warriors Ethan and Sarah can outrun them and resurrect the Good Imoogi, Buraki's ancient nemesis.

programme.title: Flatliners (2017)
programme.desc: Med students stop their hearts to experience the afterlife.

programme.title: Armored
programme.desc: A young armored car guard is persuaded by his veteran cohorts to empty the truck of its $10 Million.

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

Never before has a date in history been so significant to so many cultures, so many religions, scientists, and governments. 2012 is an epic adventure about a global cataclysm that brings an end to the world and tells of the heroic struggle of the survivors.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: Human cloning technology has fallen into destructive, corrupt hands but one man refuses to be a pawn in the deadly conspiracy.

programme.title: Total Recall (2012)
programme.desc: As the nation states Euromerica and New Shanghai vie for supremacy, factory worker Doug Quaid begins to suspect that he's a spy, though he is unaware which side of the fight he's on.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Insidious: The Last Key
programme.desc: Parapsychologist Dr. Elise Rainier faces her most fearsome and personal haunting yet - in her own family home.

programme.title: The 5th Wave
programme.desc: When the human race is on the verge of extinction, one of the last survivors on earth, an extraordinary young woman, goes on a mission to track down her younger brother who was abducted by the extra-terrestial creatures colonizing earth.

programme.title: Anaconda 3: Offspring
programme.desc: A ruthless mercenary, Hammett (David Hasselhoff) and his team are on the hunt for a pair of giant snakes that have escaped and are on a mega-sized feeding frenzy.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Gothika
programme.desc: A criminal psychologist (Berry) awakens to find herself a patient in the institution where she works, with no memory of the murder she's accused of committing. As she tries to regain her memory - and her freedom - a vengeful spirit manipulates her.

programme.title: Elysium
programme.desc: In 2154, two classes of people exist: the very wealthy, and the rest, who live on a ruined Earth.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: To prove his loyalty Alex is sent on a mission for Scorpia, with Tom and Kyra following close behind hoping to rescue him. Meanwhile the Department attempt to unlock the secret of Invisible Sword.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Alex returns home with a dark mission of revenge. Jack, Tom and Kyra must enlist the help of unlikely allies to save Alex before he commits to Scorpia forever.

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: Captured and questioned by the Department, Alex must rely on his friends to remind him who he truly is. But are there still truths about his past the Department haven't told him?

programme.title: Alex Rider
programme.desc: As Scorpia orchestrate the final stages of their plan to threaten the lives of an entire British city, Alex must again go back undercover in a desperate bid to stop Julia Rothman before it's too late.

programme.title: Alex Rider

programme.title: Alex Rider

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: Legally Blonde
programme.desc: Elle Woods (Reese Witherspoon) has it all. She wants nothing more than to be Mrs. Warner Huntington III. But there is one thing stopping him (Matthew Davis) from proposing: She is too blond. Elle rallies all of her resources and gets into Harvard, determined to win him back.

programme.title: Earth, Wind & Fire (To Be Celestial vs. That's the Weight of the World)
programme.desc: Directed by Ahmir Questlove Thompson, exploring the musical origins and lasting cultural impact of Earth, Wind and Fire.

programme.title: Us
programme.desc: Accompanied by her husband, son and daughter, Adelaide Wilson returns to the beachfront home where she grew up as a child. Haunted by a traumatic experience from the past, Adelaide grows increasingly concerned that something bad is going to happen. Her worst fears soon become a reality when four masked strangers descend upon the house, forcing the Wilsons into a fight for survival. When the masks come off, the family is horrified to learn that each attacker takes the appearance of one of them.

programme.title: Hereditary
programme.desc: When the matriarch of the Graham family passes away, her daughter and grandchildren begin to unravel cryptic and increasingly terrifying secrets about their ancestry, trying to outrun the sinister fate they have inherited.

programme.title: The Moment
programme.desc: As her arena tour debut looms, a pop star finds herself caught inside the afterglow of a breakout summer under the mounting pressure of what it costs to stay on top.

programme.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
programme.desc: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace. Eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she's returned to them. However, what should be a joyful reunion soon turns into a living nightmare as she starts to transform into something truly horrifying.

programme.title: Undertone
programme.desc: The host of a popular paranormal podcast is sent hidden messages within anonymous recordings, unleashing a demonic presence that is impossible to escape.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: Lurker
programme.desc: A retail employee infiltrates the inner circle of an artist on the verge of stardom. As he gets closer to the budding music star, access and proximity become a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The Man Will Burn
programme.desc: Burning Man grows from an anti-establishment group in San Francisco, founded by Larry Harvey in the 1980s, to a multi-million-dollar event with thousands of attendees and the backing of billionaire tech donors; first-time Burners look forward to the experience, while repeat attendees and organizers prep for the unpredictable as COVID-19 threatens the event.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra, driven by her faith in Alicent, prepares to take King's Landing while the Triarchy sets sail to confront Corlys at the Gullet.

programme.title: Josh Johnson: Symphony
programme.desc: Debuting original material about the shared experiences as humans, tackling topics like family, religion and relationships through his unique point of view and signature creativity; expecting an original and unforgettable experience, filmed at the Wiltern Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Goodbye Christopher Robin
programme.desc: After leaving London for the English countryside, writer A.A. Milne starts to spin fanciful yarns about his son's growing collection of stuffed animals. These stories form the basis for Winnie-the-Pooh and The House at Pooh Corner, published respectively in 1926 and 1928. Milne and his family soon become swept up in the instant success of the books, while the enchanting tales bring hope and comfort to the rest of postwar England.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: The Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ashley "Ash" Williams (Bruce Campbell), his girlfriend and three pals hike into the woods to a cabin for a fun night away. There they find an old book, the Necronomicon, whose text reawakens the dead when it's read aloud. The friends inadvertently release a flood of evil and must fight for their lives or become one of the evil dead. Ash watches his friends become possessed, and must make a difficult decision before daybreak to save his own life in this, the first of Sam Raimi's trilogy.

programme.title: Evil Dead II
programme.desc: The second of three films in the Evil Dead series is part horror, part comedy, with Ash Williams (Bruce Campbell) once again battling horrifying demons at a secluded cabin in the woods. After discovering an audiotape left by a college professor that contains voices reading from the Book of the Dead, Ash's girlfriend Linda (Denise Bixler) becomes possessed by evil spirits that are awakened by the voices on the tape. Ash soon discovers there is no escaping the woods.

programme.title: Evil Dead
programme.desc: Mia (Jane Levy), a drug addict, is determined to kick the habit. To that end, she asks her brother, David (Shiloh Fernandez), his girlfriend, Natalie (Elizabeth Blackmore) and their friends Olivia (Jessica Lucas) and Eric (Lou Taylor Pucci) to accompany her to their family's remote forest cabin to help her through withdrawal. Eric finds a mysterious Book of the Dead at the cabin and reads aloud from it, awakening an ancient demon. All hell breaks loose when the malevolent entity possesses Mia.

programme.title: Evil Dead Rise
programme.desc: A reunion between two estranged sisters gets cut short by the rise of flesh-possessing demons, thrusting them into a primal battle for survival as they face the most nightmarish version of family imaginable.

programme.title: Open Water
programme.desc: Daniel (Daniel Travis) and Susan (Blanchard Ryan) embark on a tropical vacation with their scuba-diving certifications in tow. During a group dive, the two separate themselves from the others to dive a little deeper. An incorrect head-count suggests the entire group has returned, so the boat departs. When the pair surfaces, they make out a vessel in the distance, but it does not immediately set in that they have been left behind. With sharks lurking beneath, their survival chances grow smaller.

programme.title: The Man Will Burn
programme.desc: Burning Man grows from an anti-establishment group in San Francisco, founded by Larry Harvey in the 1980s, to a multi-million-dollar event with thousands of attendees and the backing of billionaire tech donors; first-time Burners look forward to the experience, while repeat attendees and organizers prep for the unpredictable as COVID-19 threatens the event.

programme.title: Life, Larry and the Pursuit of Unhappiness
programme.desc: Larry crashes a party in Boston Harbor; Joe McCarthy airs his grievances on the senate floor.

programme.title: Deadpool 2
programme.desc: Wisecracking mercenary Deadpool meets Russell, an angry teenage mutant who lives at an orphanage. When Russell becomes the target of Cable -- a genetically enhanced soldier from the future -- Deadpool realizes that he'll need some help saving the boy from such a superior enemy. He soon joins forces with Bedlam, Shatterstar, Domino and other powerful mutants to protect young Russell from Cable and his advanced weaponry.

programme.title: How to Make a Killing
programme.desc: Disowned by his obscenely wealthy family, Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

programme.title: Ready Player One
programme.desc: In 2045, the creator of a virtual reality universe promises his fortune to the first person to discover a digital Easter egg. Soon, young Wade Watts finds himself in a reality-bending treasure hunt through the mysterious and fantastical world.

programme.title: No Hard Feelings
programme.desc: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

programme.title: Ocean's Eight
programme.desc: Debbie Ocean assembles an all-female team of thieves and specialists for a heist during the Met Gala, aiming for the $150 million worth of diamonds around the neck of world-famous actress Daphne Kluger.

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: The story of the Targaryen civil war with King Viserys I Targaryen's children battling for control of the Iron Throne.

programme.title: Midsommar
programme.desc: A young American couple, their relationship foundering, travel to a Swedish midsummer festival where a seemingly pastoral paradise transforms into a sinister, dread-soaked nightmare as the locals reveal their terrifying agenda.

programme.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
programme.desc: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

programme.title: Women Is Losers
programme.desc: Celina Guerrero attempts to rise above poverty in the 1960s San Francisco.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
programme.desc: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
programme.desc: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

programme.title: Chimp Crazy
programme.desc: This HBO docuseries explores the captivating, often unfathomable, and secretive world of raising chimpanzees.

programme.title: Chimp Crazy
programme.desc: PETA launches an investigation after a former Hollywood chimp named Tonka goes missing; it's a high-stakes legal battle, particularly in light of a brutal attack that happened years earlier when another chimp nearly killed a Connecticut woman.

programme.title: Chimp Crazy
programme.desc: Actor Alan Cumming, who also has a special relationship with Tonka, adds $10,000 to a reward for Tonka's whereabouts, and the film crew faces an ethical dilemma as parallels are drawn to a previous PETA case that took a dangerous turn in Oregon.

programme.title: Chimp Crazy
programme.desc: Tonka's fate becomes clearer while Tonia struggles to let go and dreams of one day opening her own island sanctuary where she can live among chimpanzees.

programme.title: The Rover
programme.desc: In the near future, mankind's greed and excesses have pushed civilization to the breaking point. Society is in decline, and the rule of law has disintegrated. Hardened drifter Eric (Guy Pearce) wanders across this dangerous and desolate landscape. When thieves steal Eric's car -- and only remaining possession -- they leave behind Rey (Robert Pattinson), a wounded comrade. Eric forces Rey to help him hunt down the gang in an unrelenting quest to take back the one thing that matters to him.

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie
programme.desc: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

programme.title: Deadpool 2
programme.desc: Wisecracking mercenary Deadpool meets Russell, an angry teenage mutant who lives at an orphanage. When Russell becomes the target of Cable -- a genetically enhanced soldier from the future -- Deadpool realizes that he'll need some help saving the boy from such a superior enemy. He soon joins forces with Bedlam, Shatterstar, Domino and other powerful mutants to protect young Russell from Cable and his advanced weaponry.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: A scientist revives a murdered woman as a companion for a legendary creature. The aftermath defies all expectations.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Madagascar 3: Europe's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Animal pals Alex (Ben Stiller), Marty (Chris Rock), Melman (David Schwimmer) and Gloria (Jada Pinkett Smith) are still trying to make it back to New York's Central Park Zoo. They are forced to take a detour to Europe to find the penguins and chimps who broke the bank at a Monte Carlo casino. When French animal-control officer Capitaine Chantel DuBois (Frances McDormand) picks up their scent, Alex and company are forced to hide out in a traveling circus.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
programme.desc: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Robert McCall (Denzel Washington), a man of mysterious origin who believes he has put the past behind him, dedicates himself to creating a quiet new life. However, when he meets Teri (Chloë Grace Moretz), a teenager who has been manhandled by violent Russian mobsters, he simply cannot walk away. With his set of formidable skills, McCall comes out of self-imposed retirement and emerges as an avenging angel, ready to take down anyone who brutalizes the helpless.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Robert McCall's mysterious past cuts especially close to home when thugs kill Susan Plummer, his best friend and former colleague. Now out for revenge, McCall must take on a crew of highly trained assassins who'll stop at nothing to destroy him.

programme.title: The Equalizer 3
programme.desc: Since giving up his life as a government assassin, Robert McCall finds solace in serving justice on behalf of the oppressed. Now living in Southern Italy, he soon discovers his new friends are under the control of local crime bosses. As events turn deadly, McCall becomes their protector by taking on the mafia.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn apart from her sister and her children, Celie faces many hardships in life, including an abusive husband. With support from a sultry singer named Shug Avery, as well as her stand-her-ground stepdaughter, Celie ultimately finds extraordinary strength in the unbreakable bonds of a new kind of sisterhood.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: Paycheck to Paycheck: The Life & Times of Katrina Gilbert
programme.desc: A single mother from Tennessee struggles to support her family on a near-minimum-wage salary.

programme.title: Nixon by Nixon: In His Own Words
programme.desc: Richard Nixon secretly records his private conversations in the White House from 1971 to 1973.

programme.title: Surveilled
programme.desc: Tracking The New Yorker journalist Ronan Farrow as he investigates the growing business of commercial spyware, following the story from New York City to Tel Aviv, Israel, a thriving center of espionage cybertechnology. Once a target of covert surveillance himself, Farrow explores the multibillion-dollar industry, addressing the twofold uses and implications of phone hacking, the ability to monitor criminal activity and the attendant threats to civil liberties.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? Do you think you might be in the top 50 per cent of the country, the top ten per cent, or even the top one per cent? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack is back with the first episode of the third series of The 1 Club, the ultimate leveller of a quiz show as it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at them... and that's because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. It doesn't matter if you're 15 or 50 as this is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show, but who will make it to the end for a chance to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right... and win up to 100,000 pounds?

The women of Salt Lake come together in New York City to rehash the fifth series as Bronwyn opens up to the women about her difficult entry into the group - when she confronts Lisa about a damaging comment regarding her daughter, the rift continues to grow when Lisa shares receipts that threaten the future of their friendship. Elsewhere, Meredith and Angie attempt to resolve their long-standing issues, Whitney addresses the rumours about her business, and the husbands take the stage as Bronwyn's husband Todd faces off in a spicy exchange with the Barlows.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Jenn demands answers about the background check on Ryan, but Tamra explains the twisted truth as Shannon departs from the group to meet up with her daughters - after Heather learns that Katie is spreading rumours about her that involve the kids and the ladies explore the English countryside, Gina becomes collateral damage when Tamra reveals that Shannon allegedly had damning info about Gina to expose at the 17th series reunion.

programme.title: Dinner Date
programme.desc: Sales director Colm is going to be given five menus, each put together by a potential blind date. The five women behind the menus have all come up with a three course meal but Colm will only be having dinner with three of them. He will choose his dates based on the menus he most likes the look of. But when the dinners have been eaten and the dates are done, who will he want to see for seconds?

programme.title: Supermarket Sweep
programme.desc: Rylan Clark-Neal hosts a revamp of the iconic game show where three pairs of shoppers go wild in the aisles as they compete in the ultimate supermarket challenge to win a 3,000-pound prize - along with the classic Supermarket Sweep quizzes, trolley dashes and pastel jumpers, the revamped show features exciting new games, challenges and some famous faces.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the dramatic and fast-paced game show. Contestants test their knowledge of sandwich ingredients, rappers and sports.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Tommy and Georgia finally move into their dream home and set their sights on hosting Georgia's baby shower. Clelia ends things with Rem, and he resolves to rid himself of his bad boy reputation. Diags takes on a world record attempt - naming as many capital cities as he can...while riding a rollercoaster!

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: US reality series peeking inside the unconventional lives of six successful women living in or around Salt Lake City, Utah. The husbands talk about their role in their wives' arguments, tensions reach an all-time high as Meredith attempts to clear her name to Angie's husband Shawn over the rumours that have circled the group for two years, Heather challenges Bronwyn's shifting narrative on her infidelity story with Todd, Mary gives an emotional update on Robert Jr, and the ladies have an impactful and honest conversation.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Orange County
programme.desc: Reality show following the lavish lifestyles of five 'housewives' and their families. Jenn returns from the Bahamas and announces her engagement, and Alexis and Katie host an engagement party where Heather and Emily confront Katie over allegations made about Emily's twins and lead Katie to reveal that she has more proof that Heather is a liar - elsewhere, Gina and Travis discuss the future of their family and Ryan makes headlines when his name is involved in a national bombshell that sends shockwaves through Orange County.

programme.title: New: Celebrity Catchphrase
programme.desc: Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Bonnie Langford, Aston Merrygold, and Liza Tarbuck all trying to 'say what they see' as they guess well-known phrases for the chance to win a 50,000-pound jackpot for their chosen charity.

programme.title: The Floor US
programme.desc: Rob Lowe hosts the American version of the game show. Contestants test their knowledge of sports films, college basketball, Star Trek, and yoga.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show - it doesn't matter if you're not usually good at quizzes because the questions have nothing to do with remembering facts and are all about logic and common sense. This is the quiz that the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show and try to make it to the end to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right and win up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: New: Love Island
programme.desc: Reality show. Glamorous singles live in a beautiful villa under the watchful gaze of an audience at home who have the power to decide who goes and who will win a huge cash prize. [S] S13 Ep43

programme.title: New: Love Island: The Debrief
programme.desc: Your daily drop of hot Love Island tea, and all the Villa gossip. With Shakira Khan, Toni Laites and Yasmin Pettet, nothing is off-topic or out of the question. [S] S1 Ep31

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Aimee's thrown a heartfelt send-off before her debut in the Priscilla Untold musical, and the boys fret about their own futures, but then descend into elaborate pranks instead. Mia- Louise faces a crossroads when her coach warns that talent means nothing without commitment, forcing her to choose between football and Aimee's big night. Influenced by Anna's version of events, Aimee begins doubting Wayne, but before the show discovers Anna has manipulated the truth. Hurt, Aimee spots Wayne in the audience and channels raw emotion into a performance that stuns the crowd. Mia-Louise inspires her team to victory with a heartfelt team talk before deciding if she really wants football to be her whole identity. After the show, Wayne suffers a heart attack, forcing a furious confrontation between Aimee and Anna.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy about American family life. After robbers enter the Griffin house, the family tries to gain safety in Peter's panic room. Trapped with no way out, Peter decides to tell his family the history of their ancestry by narrating a chain of events that describe his family's past.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. After a pregnancy scare, Peter reluctantly agrees to get a vasectomy. But after the operation, Peter's sex drive becomes non-existent. When Lois packs on some extra pounds, Peter's interest is renewed, and things heat back up in the bedroom. Meanwhile, Stewie's half-brother and rival Bertram confronts him, and they declare an all-out war for control over the playground.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated comedy. When the Smiths try to plan a family game night, they realise Roger has been cheating on them with other families. Stan, Francine, Hayley and Steve go on the offensive to teach Roger a lesson about monogamy.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about family man Stan Smith, who works for the CIA. Hayley breaks up with her boyfriend and ends up in the arms of Stan's CIA body double - but things get very complicated when the body double starts making advances to Francine.

programme.title: George & Mildred
programme.desc: Domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. George wonders how he can break the news that he has resigned from his job to Mildred without incurring her wrath.

programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: George & Mildred
programme.desc: Domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. George has to babysit Tarquin when Jeffrey and Ann entrust him to the Ropers for the day.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A body with gunshot wounds to the head is washed ashore. Although the corpse is almost unidentifiable, two women each claim that it must be their missing husband.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Drama series about a Cornish police detective. Wycliffe is summoned to trace a farmer who has disappeared.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Drama series. When a schoolgirl is found dead in a science lab after a school disco, Wycliffe sets out to discover whether it's a case of murder or suicide.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: ITV presents a drama exploring the early years of Colin Dexter's legendary detective and originally shown to mark the 25th anniversary of the first episode of Inspector Morse. 1965 - young Detective Constable Endeavour Morse has become disillusioned with his job, only for the search for a missing schoolgirl to draw him back to Oxford, the city which will shape and define his destiny. As he gets deeper into a full-blown murder investigation led by Detective Inspector Fred Thursday, Morse finds himself sidelined, discredited, and at a dead end. As he tries to face down the demons of his past, Morse begins his own quest for justice, risking everything in the hunt for a truth that will haunt him for the rest of his life.

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about HE Bates's eccentric Larkin family. Ma starts making plans for a lavish wedding now that Mariette is going to marry Charley the tax inspector, but has Pop overreached himself with his offer of a stately home?

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series based on HE Bates' novels about the Larkin family. Pop Larkin is about to join the large number of villagers who wish with all their hearts that they had never met Corinne Perigo...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Murder mystery drama. When Barnaby and Scott investigate the murder of a pub barman, Barnaby wonders if it may be the result of a case of mistaken identity.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The murder of undertaker Patrick Pennyman takes Barnaby and Scott to the pretty village of Fletcher's Cross, where residents are divided about the rights and wrongs of a spiritualist church run by medium Rosetta Price - when Joyce Barnaby's friend Elizabeth is also killed, the detectives must find if there is a link between the funeral parlour and revelations from the spirit world.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The annual Midsomer Regatta is brought to a standstill when a body is found in a river - ladies' man Guy Sweetman was killed after arguing with his rowing club friends Phillip Trent and John Parkway. As Barnaby and Scott dig into the luxury lifestyles of the regatta set, they discover money problems and sexual jealousy are rife - Guy seems to have upset many people, but who killed him?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When one of the world's rarest orchids is smuggled illegally into Midsomer Malham, it triggers a catalogue of passion, jealousy and death - first retired classics teacher and secret sexual siren Madeline Villiers is poisoned with hemlock, then compulsive collector Henry Plummer is strangled and his beloved orchids destroyed. Barnaby and Troy must find the delicate yellow Roth plant and root out who is prepared to spend hundreds of thousands of pounds - and commit murder - just to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. While investigating the mysterious death of pensioner Margaret Kraszewski on a busy Newcastle Metro train at the height of rush hour, DCI Vera Stanhope finds herself in a quiet Northumberland coastal town with clues that keep revolving around one street. Why are its residents so reluctant to talk?

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The Clarets XI old boys' cricket team gather in Oxford for their annual match, but one of the team meets an untimely death before the first ball is bowled - as Morse pieces together the clues, he realises that the Clarets players have more than cricket on their minds.

programme.title: George & Mildred
programme.desc: Domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. Mildred is suspicious when George buys her an expensive present for their 26th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: George & Mildred
programme.desc: Domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. Mildred wants her dog to have all the things she never had, and this includes the joys of motherhood - even George is keen when he learns that there could be money in it...

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. An archaeological dig uncovers a 30-year-old skeleton that seems to unsettle a local landowning family.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: Detective drama series. Wycliffe is called in when a surfer is washed up on a beach with head injuries. Starring Jack Shepherd.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. When Martin and Louisa do not seem to be having much success with their therapy, Dr Timoney advises that they should try to take things back to the beginning of their relationship and plan a date - meanwhile, Louisa's ex-boyfriend Danny arrives from London with seven children to camp on Ruth's farm, things are going slightly better for Mrs Tishell and Clive, and Penhale is keen to lay down the law when Bert's whisky still is discovered.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a controversial new anti-depressant drug, is her death murder or suicide? Lewis and Hathaway investigate and, as the body count rises, uncover a web of lies, jealousy and madness that Lewis himself could fall victim to.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When Miss Marple accompanies Lady Virginia Revel to a weekend party at country estate Chimneys, she finds herself in the middle of an important diplomatic gathering which includes a number of Virginia's suitors. The strange array of guests clash over dinner, and that night Count Ludwig of Austria is found dead. When Miss Marple and Chief Inspector Finch discover a coded message and the remains of a murdered servant, Marple realises that the secret of Chimneys is even darker than she imagined.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Scott investigate a death in Midsomer Mere, a place where villagers seem to have the ability to predict future events - John Ransom's head was covered in scorch marks, the result of his brother Max's research into second sight. Is his death due to a pub brawl with his brother-in-law Ben Kirby over plans for a baptism, or is he a casualty of the bizarre experiments? In the battle between faith and science, even Barnaby thinks he has seen a man somewhere before... it's time to delve into the village's history for clues.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a solicitor falls from a roof to his death, Barnaby and Scott investigate whether it was suicide or murder. They discover that a rival lawyer was spreading harmful rumours about the dead man, but when this man is drugged and killed as well, the motive looks like revenge - but for what?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Devil's Work: When the heir to the Stourwick Estate announces that his tenure will be the Shirewell family's last, someone sets about ensuring his plans never come to fruition. [S,AD] S24 Ep1

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The picturesque village of Mods Mire, famed for its annual charity pub quiz, is brimming with question setters and solvers - even the name is a puzzle to riddle out. It is home to the world-famous author Bertram Jewel, who created the bestseller Seeker, a book which sparked a nationwide treasure hunt by promising a hidden prize worth a life-changing amount to the person who could solve the clues within the drawings in its pages. Now, ten years later, with no-one any closer to finding the treasure, Bertram is relaunching the bestseller and has an announcement - as fans flock to Mods Mire for the relaunch, will this year finally be the year the treasure is unearthed? Only one can be bright enough to solve the cryptic clues, but when locals begin being murdered, Barnaby and Winter must see through the puzzles and sleight of hand to discover that, as always, murder is brutal but solvable when you have got all the pieces of the puzzle. Could this really be merely the work of a crazed fan?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope unearths a 30-year-old mystery when the son of a prominent local family is found brutally murdered on the sands of a seaside resort. When a second death takes place, Vera is faced with mounting pressure to crack the case.

programme.title: Wycliffe
programme.desc: A body with gunshot wounds to the head is washed ashore. Although the corpse is almost unidentifiable, two women each claim that it must be their missing husband.

programme.title: Trigger Point
programme.desc: Drama series following Lana Washington, an experienced bomb disposal officer working for the Metropolitan Police. With two incidents appearing to be connected, Counter Terrorism Police work to establish a link between the two victims, a retiree and a university lecturer - as the investigation continues, the team grow suspicious that they aren't being told the whole truth. When an intervention from DS Helen Morgan backfires, the unit are left at a loss.

programme.title: George & Mildred

programme.desc: Domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. A valuable family heirloom could change the Ropers' fortunes, but can Mildred get to it before her sister Ethel does?

programme.title: George & Mildred
programme.desc: A special Christmas episode from 1979 that also happened to be the final episode of the domestic sitcom spin-off from the hit '70s show Man About the House. When Mildred wants to be the belle of the Young Conservatives Christmas ball, George looks to the new barmaid at the Red Lion for some yuletide solace.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Pollard's offer for the church is accepted as friendships crumble in the village. Matthew is struck by guilt when Anna suggests loaning him money to save the Kings' business.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Anna makes a stunning discovery when she is summoned to a De Souza board meeting. An angry Nicola is faced with homelessness as Edna prepares for Lily to move in.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken learns Peter wants to have Simon taken into care, and offers to look after him instead, while Tina is furious with David for giving jailbird Graeme money to buy a car.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fiz gets a distressing call from her mum in South Africa and Gail worries how David will react to her relationship with Joe.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Detective drama series. When two rich and outwardly successful brothers fall under suspicion of murder, Frost's quest for the truth leads to him being suspended from duty while a new lady friend enters his life.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Feelings run high when a community of travellers passes through Aidensfield, but worse is to come when a bank robber goes on the run. Greengrass can't resist the chance to make some easy money on a pony and trap race, but can he escape the long arm of the law?

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A series of break-ins lead the police to suspect the culprit is a pupil from Pendlebury School for Boys, but they soon find that there is more afoot than a burglary spree. The Aidensfield Arms plays host to a guest who claims to have a glittering showbiz career behind him.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Careful not to be seen, Samantha Berry slips away from Whitcombe Grange - while dressed in Georgian period attire - on her way to a secret rendezvous. Unaware that a drone is filming her, she is then stabbed to death by an unseen assailant... With Kam away on a course, Barnaby and Winter meet locum pathologist Petra Antonescu and she informs them that the victim was stabbed with a feather quill pen - however, Barnaby is puzzled to find a syringe lying nearby. Tracing Samantha to the Grange, Barnaby and Winter meet owners James and Kitty Oswood - who explain that they host Jane Austen experience weekends - and Winter learns from the Oswoods' rebellious daughter Polly that Samantha kept asking questions about the house and village. When Samantha is found to be a journalist with a special interest in the local village's new delivery service for prescriptions by drone, Barnaby and Winter need to look back in time if they are to find her killer.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: As the King empire crumbles, will Matthew and Anna manage to make it down the aisle? Lee suspects Andy of sabotage, while Victoria gets the blame for Aaron's mischief making.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Ken worries Peter will gamble away Simon's inheritance. Amber is taken aback to find Tara emerging from Dev's bedroom, and a journalist comes to the factory looking for Rosie.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Prem agrees to let Dev's relationship with Tara continue, while Leanne accepts an invitation to tea with Peter - but draws the line at playing mum and putting Simon to bed.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. A mysterious suitcase disappears from a car wreck and unexplained parcels of cash are being received in the village - can Bernie help the police uncover the identity of Aidensfield's Robin Hood?

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. The Aidensfield locals have their own Scrooge to contend with in the form of a local bank manager, but the bank manager's son finds himself a target for rage when his father's mercenary ways threaten to ruin a local farmer - meanwhile, Greengrass takes the law into his own hands and sends David to pose as a debt collector.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A tour of Plummer's famous relish factory ends in tragedy when one of the visitors is crushed against towers of relish bottles and dumped naked into a 200-degree steriliser - when the dead man is found to be an executive with rival company Fieldway Foods, Barnaby and Scott's investigation uncovers many secrets and lies among the Plummer family. Someone is also trying to frighten matriarch Amelia Plummer, but who feels strongly enough about Plummer's Relish to commit murder?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A blood-stained hotel room and a stolen credit card lead Ronnie and Joe to Charles Hutton, a wealthy member of the upper classes who dotes on his wife Camille and daughter Georgia. It is hard to work out what crime has been committed, but Ronnie and Joe have enough evidence to suggest that Georgia gave birth in the hotel room. There is no trace of a baby and it proves difficult for Jake and Kate to mount a prosecution case against Georgia and her boyfriend. To make matters worse, the defence counsel turns out to be an old opponent of Jake's, Maitland Cosby. As the evidence against the young couple stacks up, how far is Georgia's father prepared to go to protect her?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series. When a spate of shootings claims one of Ronnie and Joe's own colleagues, the pair are left with little time to grieve - they must catch the killer before he or she moves on to the next person on the hit list. The next likely victim seems to be Henry Sharpe, head of the Crown Prosecution Service, but gradually the link between all the targets becomes clear. The connection is Mark Glendon, who has been in prison after being convicted of the murder of his wife four years previously. Although Glendon is still in custody, his case has been reopened for a retrial. The police face an uphill struggle to find any leads implicating Glendon in the shootings. With the new trial already underway, the race is on to catch the killer before the jury deliver their verdict.

programme.title: Trial & Retribution
programme.desc: The conclusion of this case of the crime drama. In a tense final act, Warrington and Wilding are tried together in a cut-throat trial as Warrington's defence barrister Halliday is pitted against prosecution counsel Willis Fletcher once more, but as North takes the stand as a key witness, this time the two men are joined by wily barrister Norma O'Sullivan. Only one man is guilty of murder, so can the jury unravel the complex web of lies and see justice done, can North cope with Warrington's persistent fixation with her, and can her relationship with Walker flourish under relentless pressure?

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Drama series about the shady dealings of a loveable rogue and his reluctant sidekick. The chips are down for Arthur's friend Maurice when the professional gambler is barred from the casinos and mugged of all his winnings - Terry's job is to mind Maurice while he recoups his losses.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor whose life is disrupted when his brother and young nephew move in with him. When Alan and Judith meet Jake's teacher Francine to discuss his attitude in school, Alan loses interest in Kandi and turns toward his son's tutor instead.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor whose life is disrupted when his brother and young nephew move in with him. Charlie and Alan help Jake prepare when he is invited to a party that girls will also be attending.

programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.
