programme.desc: A military investigator (Lou Diamond Phillips) goes beyond the call of duty to find out who killed the wife of a highly regarded Marine.

programme.title: Red Headed Stranger
programme.desc: The Rev. Shay moves out West to set up his new home in Montana so that he can spread God's word. But when his wife, Raysha, leaves him for another man -- in part because she wants to return to Philadelphia -- the reverend decides to replace his spiritual ways with a gun. After shooting down his wife and her lover, he battles a landowner intent on keeping all the town's water for himself. But his deadly ways make him yearn for a belief in God again.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: On the day of his retirement, detective Jerry Black (Jack Nicholson) accepts a gift -- an airline ticket to Mexico. But when the body of a murdered eight-year-old girl is discovered in the mountains, Jerry offers his expertise at the crime scene. When an ambitious younger cop wrenches a dubious confession from a simple-minded suspect, the case is closed... but not for Jerry.

programme.title: Snatch
programme.desc: Illegal boxing promoter Turkish (Jason Statham) convinces gangster Brick Top (Alan Ford) to offer bets on bare-knuckle boxer Mickey (Brad Pitt) at his bookie business. When Mickey does not throw his first fight as agreed, an infuriated Brick Top demands another match. Meanwhile, gangster Frankie Four Fingers (Benicio Del Toro) comes to place a bet for a friend with Brick Top's bookies, as multiple criminals converge on a stolen diamond that Frankie has come to London to sell.

programme.title: The Informers
programme.desc: In the 1980s Los Angeles, a group of self-absorbed hedonists drift through their lives without the benefit of a moral compass. A movie executive (Billy Bob Thornton) carries on an affair with a newscaster, while his son (Jon Foster) tries to sort out his relationship with his promiscuous girlfriend (Amber Heard). Meanwhile, a sleazy ex-con (Mickey Rourke) hatches a plan to sell a kidnapped child for some quick cash.

programme.title: The Hunt for Eagle One
programme.desc: A lieutenant (Mark Dacascos) leads his men in a daring mission to rescue a captain (Theresa Randle) who is trapped behind enemy lines.

programme.title: The Hunt for Eagle One: Crash Point
programme.desc: Marines venture into enemy territory to retrieve an anti-hijacking device stolen by terrorists.

programme.title: Panic Room
programme.desc: Trapped in their New York brownstone's panic room, a hidden chamber built as a sanctuary in the event of break-ins, newly divorced Meg Altman (Jodie Foster) and her young daughter Sarah (Kristen Stewart) play a deadly game of cat-and-mouse with three intruders - Burnham (Forest Whitaker), Raoul (Dwight Yoakam) and Junior (Jared Leto) - during a brutal home invasion. But the room itself is the focal point because what the intruders really want is inside it.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A world of the very near future in which cattle, fish and even family pet can be cloned. But cloning humans is illegal -- that is until family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Taken from his family and plunged into a sinister world he doesn't understand, Gibson must not only save himself from the assassins who must now destroy him to protect their secret, but uncover who and what is behind the horrible things happening to him.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail of Blood
programme.desc: A genetically created Anaconda, cut in half, regenerates itself into two aggressive giant snakes, due to the Blood Orchid.

programme.title: The Principal
programme.desc: The new principal (James Belushi) of a drug-infested high school joins with a security guard (Louis Gossett Jr.) to clean it up.

programme.title: American Crude
programme.desc: A man (Ron Livingston) meets a prostitute, an ex-convict and a porn king when he throws a bachelor party for his best friend (Rob Schneider).

programme.title: Love Lies Bleeding
programme.desc: A corrupt DEA agent (Christian Slater) chases a young couple (Jenna Dewan, Brian Geraghty) who are in possession of money from a botched drug deal.

programme.title: Solo
programme.desc: Android military weapon Solo (Mario Van Peebles) is designed to put down Latin American rebels. But when Solo arrives, the machine feels compassion for the rebels fighting for freedom. Despite Solo's design, he begins fighting for the people he's supposed to kill. When his creators, including Gen. Haynes (Barry Corbin), attempt to bring him back, he flees. But the military doesn't give up. They send an upgraded android into the field to take Solo -- and the villagers -- down.

programme.title: Flatliners
programme.desc: Seeking answers about the afterlife, Chicago medical student Nelson (Kiefer Sutherland) persuades his fellow pupils to help him end his life, and then resuscitate him in the nick of time. Atheist David (Kevin Bacon), playboy Joe (William Baldwin) and troubled Rachel (Julia Roberts) also journey into the unknown, looking for meaning in their own lives. As the experiments become more perilous, each is forced to contend with the paranormal consequences of trespassing on the other side.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A world of the very near future in which cattle, fish and even family pet can be cloned. But cloning humans is illegal -- that is until family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Taken from his family and plunged into a sinister world he doesn't understand, Gibson must not only save himself from the assassins who must now destroy him to protect their secret, but uncover who and what is behind the horrible things happening to him.

programme.title: Anacondas: Trail of Blood
programme.desc: A genetically created Anaconda, cut in half, regenerates itself into two aggressive giant snakes, due to the Blood Orchid.

programme.title: The Principal
programme.desc: The new principal (James Belushi) of a drug-infested high school joins with a security guard (Louis Gossett Jr.) to clean it up.

programme.title: American Crude
programme.desc: A man (Ron Livingston) meets a prostitute, an ex-convict and a porn king when he throws a bachelor party for his best friend (Rob Schneider).

programme.title: Love Lies Bleeding
programme.desc: A corrupt DEA agent (Christian Slater) chases a young couple (Jenna Dewan, Brian Geraghty) who are in possession of money from a botched drug deal.

programme.title: Fathers and Sons
programme.desc: ESP and danger bond a beach-town intellectual (Jeff Goldblum) and his son (Rory Cochrane) despite their clashing friends and lives.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown to D-Day
programme.desc: Gen. Dwight D. Eisenhower (Tom Selleck) faces monumental decisions in the 90 days leading to the Allied invasion of Normandy in 1944.

programme.title: American Outlaws
programme.desc: After the Civil War ends, Confederate soldiers Frank (Gabriel Macht) and Jesse James (Colin Farrell) return home with the three Younger brothers to learn that railroad baron Thaddeus Rains (Harris Yulin) is trying to drive Missouri citizens out of their homes. When both families resist, the James boys' mother (Kathy Bates) is murdered. Furious, the two groups of brothers team up for a series of robberies designed to hurt the railroad. Detective Allan Pinkerton (Timothy Dalton) pursues them.

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: Gideon (Pierce Brosnan), a former Union officer, finds himself the prey of a manhunt led by Carver (Liam Neeson), Gideon's Civil-War nemesis. Carver blames Gideon for a horrible war crime and refuses to give up the chase until his vengeance is complete. Gideon, though wounded, manages to stay one step ahead of his pursuers, until he and his mortal enemy meet in a final inevitable showdown.

programme.title: The Mountain Men
programme.desc: Two old-time Wyoming fur trappers (Charlton Heston, Brian Keith) try to protect a runaway Indian (Victoria Racimo) from her angry ex-mate.

programme.title: Hanover Street
programme.desc: A U.S. bomber pilot (Harrison Ford) goes on a secret World War II mission with his English lover's (Lesley-Anne Down) husband (Christopher Plummer).

programme.title: Blood Crime
programme.desc: A policeman discovers that the man he beat up, the son of a sheriff (James Caan), was later murdered.

programme.title: The Scarlet and the Black
programme.desc: Defying a Nazi colonel (Christopher Plummer), Vatican Monsignor Hugh O'Flaherty (Gregory Peck) hides thousands of escaped POWs in occupied Rome.

programme.title: Relentless
programme.desc: Los Angeles police detectives (Robert Loggia, Leo Rossi) track the so-called Sunset Killer (Judd Nelson), who taunts them with messages.

programme.title: Conspiracy
programme.desc: A former Marine (Val Kilmer) brings justice to a small town after his friend mysteriously disappears.

programme.title: Ike: Countdown to D-Day
programme.desc: Gen. Dwight D. Eisenhower (Tom Selleck) faces monumental decisions in the 90 days leading to the Allied invasion of Normandy in 1944.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: An Army sergeant (James Belushi), his crew (Mark Lee, Paul Empson) and stragglers try to hold off a Nazi battalion at a Libyan waterhole.

programme.title: The Desperadoes
programme.desc: Sheriff Steve Upton (Randolph Scott) is a devoted lawman who works tirelessly to keep order in his small town, nestled within the Utah territory. So, when Cheyenne Rogers (Glenn Ford), an old friend with a criminal past, rolls into town, Upton is immediately on edge. Cheyenne assures his pal that all that's behind him now. But when the town bank is robbed, Cheyenne becomes the locals' number one suspect. He'll have to prove his innocence to save himself and his friend's reputation.

programme.title: Decision at Sundown
programme.desc: Hell-bent on revenge, flinty gunslinger Bart Allison (Randolph Scott) rides into a sleepy Western town with one goal in mind: to kill local roughneck Tate Kimbrough (John Carroll), who kidnapped his wife years ago. Both men have blood on their hands over the woman's eventual suicide. Allison and Kimbrough, wracked with guilt but boiling over with bloodlust, are set to face off for one final confrontation. Tensions mount as sunset approaches, and the townspeople must choose sides.

programme.title: Oklahoma Crude
programme.desc: A wildcatter (Faye Dunaway), her father (John Mills) and a boozing drifter (George C. Scott) defend her oil derrick in 1913 Oklahoma.

programme.title: The Legend of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bad guy Butch Cavendish (Christopher Lloyd) leads an ambush on the Texas Rangers, gunning down all but the young John Reid (Klinton Spilsbury), a lawyer who had joined his Ranger brother, Dan (John Bennett Perry), in the pursuit of Cavendish. Reid, who was injured in the attack, slowly recovers with the help of his childhood friend, the Native American Tonto (Michael Horse). Afterward, Reid dons a mask, calls himself the Lone Ranger and begins fighting evil with Tonto.

programme.title: Aankhen
programme.desc: A strict bank manager, betrayed by an employee, seeks revenge by enlisting three blind men to rob the bank; the plan soon backfires dramatically.

programme.title: Dil Hai Betaab
programme.desc: Meena and Raja run into problems when they find out that Ajay also loves Meena and will not permit anyone to get in their way.

programme.title: Jawani Zindabad
programme.desc: Shashi must gather resources to free his sister and falsely accused of attempted murder.

programme.title: Aatish
programme.desc: A man seeks revenge against those who wronged him, navigating betrayal and danger while uncovering truths that reshape his quest for justice and redemption.

programme.title: Pagalpanti

programme.desc: Michael and a rebuilt KITT rush to stop Nordstrom (John Considine) before he can hand over the new isotope.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: KITT falls into a trap trying to capture two convicts fleeing to South America; guest Robert F. Lyons.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Hijackers threaten to kill airline passenger hostages one by one, including Bonnie.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael tries to save an Indian burial ground from a greedy oil man; guests Robert Pine, Gina Gallego.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A motorcycle gang hijacks a Foundation truck containing computers and forces a young computer whiz to break into a local bank.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael infiltrates an embassy to investigate foreign diplomats and their plans to sell a stolen canister of deadly bacteria.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael and KITT battle a military hovercraft hijacked for sale to a weaponeer.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A hateful man (William Windom) seeks revenge against the husband (John Crawford) of his former lover by sabotaging his race car. With David Hasselhoff, Jourdan Fremin, Norbert Weisser.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve poses as a mercenary to stop traitors posing as GIs from stealing a secret missile.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A friend (Steven Macht) of Steve's is the guinea pig in an experiment to transfer computer knowledge into the human brain.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve rushes to Wyoming to destroy an out-of-control probe, built to explore Venus.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve joins forces with Soviet experts to stop a Venus probe which is loose and wreaking havoc in Wyoming.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Kidnappers stalk a boy (Lanny Horn) who has accidentally invented a new form of thermochemical energy; guest Frank Marth.

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: A sheriff and a congressman sabotage an oil-drilling site; guests Ken Swofford, Bruce Glover.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: Max and Chris Williams seek the antidote to a poison given to Jaime and a Soviet diplomat.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: While working on a project to track unidentified flying objects, Dr. Wells is abducted in a flying saucer.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: First on the scene of a crashed satellite, Jaime meets an alien princess who claims enemy agents are after her.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: Jaime scuba dives as part of an OSI assignment, but is unaware she carries a device to attract sharks.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: Kidnappers after Jaime seize Oscar's secretary instead, then hold her hostage to get the real thing.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: The spirit of a comatose Native American leaves his body and tries to rescue Jaime from a deadly bomb.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: Jaime poses as a secretary to protect a Middle Eastern king from assassins during a visit to New York.

programme.title: Bionic Woman
programme.desc: Jaime teams with a crook to find a counterfeiter hiding in a Central American town full of gangsters and cutthroats.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: Michael (David Hasselhoff) goes undercover when a sinister man (Peter Brown) uses female prison inmates to commit robberies. With Julianne McNamara, Rosalind Ingledew.

programme.title: Knight Rider
programme.desc: A club-owner (Shelley Berman) and singer's (Tom Sullivan) neighborhood project upsets a greedy real-estate magnate.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The paramedics conduct several rescues under a shadow of guilt after being accused of stealing from a patient; guest Jo Anne Worley.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: DeSoto must decide whether to amputate the leg of a trapped construction worker (James McEachin); nervous Gage faces an IRS tax audit.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: An assembly bill to create a paramedic program meets opposition from doctors and firefighters; pilot for the series.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: An assembly bill to create a paramedic program meets opposition from doctors and firefighters; pilot for the series.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Gage promises to care for an injured woman's dog; the paramedics save five lives including a diabetic and a man trapped on a ledge.

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Emergency!

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: DeSoto and Gage talk down an airplane flown by a teenage boy whose father, the pilot, suffered a heart attack while at the controls.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Murdock poses as a secret agent to investigate a terrorist group based in Monte Carlo; guests Roy Dotrice, Toru Tanaka.

programme.title: The A-Team

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Assassins setting a trap for the attorney general hold Murdock, Frankie and wounded Face prisoner in a restaurant.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The rest of the team is caught while Murdock flies a girl to freedom from a religious paramilitary cult; guest John Saxon.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A boy (Meeno Peluce) whose brother (William Smith) has been unlawfully imprisoned asks his friend B.A. for help; guest Ken Norton.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is called in to investigate the death of a sergeant major at a training camp.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Homicide detective Lieutenant Columbo investigates the murder of a famous painter's ex-wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the disappearance of the director of a men's magazine.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The disheveled detective investigates the apparent suicide of a notorious racketeer who was facing an indictment.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: When a crooked estate agent dies in prison, his widow vows to exact her revenge on the two men that put him there. After killing her husband's informing boss, she sets her sights on Lieutenant Columbo.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A dentist frames his wife for a murder in order to keep up his image and expensive lifestyle.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A famous romance novelist is shot dead in the course of what looks like a robbery.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The rumpled lieutenant is invited to give a college lecture on criminology but ends up investigating the murder of one of the institution's professors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the murder of a crime show host's rival with incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is put to the test against an equally brilliant, criminal defense lawyer who murders his rock star girlfriend.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A police detective questions a jewelry-store owner whose late nephew had a winning lottery ticket.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo attends his nephew's wedding and as the couple get ready to leave on their honeymoon, the bride disappears; Columbo investigates and suspects his nephew may have made a few enemies on the police force.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a hit-and-run, followed by a car explosion.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Two women kill their two-timing lover but have solid alibis; one of the women tries to seduce Columbo to keep him off her trail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates a case involving argumentative radio talk show host Fielding Chase.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The detective is put on the case of a man who murders his brother.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo matches wits with a forensics specialist, helping his girlfriend to frame her husband for a stockbroker's murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The inimitable cop must prove that a flamboyant Hollywood gossip reporter was murdered by her former lover.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A Hollywood film composer and conductor murders a talented, young musician out of jealousy.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the apparent suicide of a tabloid reporter in the Los Angeles rave scene.

programme.title: Prescription: murder
programme.desc: A psychiatrist uses a patient, he is having an affair with to help him kill his wife. His perfect alibi may come apart at the hands of a seemingly befuddled LAPD lieutenant.

programme.title: Ransom for a Dead Man
programme.desc: Lt. Columbo (Peter Falk) outwits a lawyer (Lee Grant) who has killed her husband but made it look like a kidnapping.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A blackmailer interferes with a mystery writer's scheme to kill his former partner in a perfect crime.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo investigates the case of an unfaithful wife who was murdered when she refused to be blackmailed.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: No body, no weapon and a witness courted by the war hero she thinks committed murder, complicate a case.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo is caught in a case of stolen art and murder with evidence pointing to an innocent woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A competition between bitter siblings for ownership of a family-owned corporation, after their father's untimely death, escalates into murder.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An explosion kills an executive as he calls his wife from a car phone, and suspicion falls on a company attorney.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo excavates the area surrounding the newly poured foundation of a building to search for a corpse.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A botanical collector involves his nephew in a kidnapping to break a trust fund, then murders him to finance his hobby.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The mistress of a conductor becomes a target for murder after threatening to tell all to her lover's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A football-team manager (Robert Culp) establishes an electronic alibi for the murder of the team owner (Dean Stockwell) during a game; guests Valerie Harper, Susan Howard, James Gregory, Dean Jagger.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Columbo journeys to London to observe Scotland Yard, but winds up investigating murders committed by two Shakespearean actors.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: The ongoing feud between an out-of-favor Hollywood actress and a gossip columnist results in murder. Guest star: Anne Baxter.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A surgeon kills a nurse who suspects him of intentionally botching the heart surgery of his colleague, a cardiac expert.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An American chess champion plays a private match with his challenger and kills him because the man is a better player.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: Twins (Martin Landau in a dual role) kill their wealthy uncle just before his marriage to a younger woman.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A cosmetics manufacturer is suspected of murdering an employee (Martin Sheen) who stole a wrinkle-removing formula.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A wine connoisseur kills his playboy brother to prevent his selling the family winery to expiate his latest scandal.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A senatorial candidate exploits death threats, fabricated for publicity, to kill his manager.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A motivational researcher blackmails to further his career, kills a man, then frames the victim's wife.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: An enraged publisher hires a gunman to kill an author who intends to sign a contract with a competitor.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A prodigy and his robot help investigate the murder of a professor who threatened to disgrace a colleague's scientist son.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A gospel singer kills his evangelist wife when she denies him more money and threatens blackmail.

programme.title: Columbo
programme.desc: A man murders his wife and has a friend cover up the act with a burglary, only to have the friend blackmail him into doing the same favor in return.

programme.title: She-Wolf of London
programme.desc: Grisly murders convince a turn-of-the-century Londoner that she is the latest in a long line of werewolves.

programme.title: Son of Dracula
programme.desc: Count Alucard (Lon Chaney) makes Southern belle (Louise Allbritton) his bride.

programme.title: Son of Frankenstein
programme.desc: The baron's son (Basil Rathbone) revives his father's monster (Boris Karloff) with help from a broken-necked shepherd called Ygor (Bela Lugosi).","large":"Baron Wolf von Frankenstein is determined to prove the legitimacy of his father's scientific work, thus rescuing the family name from disgrace. With the help of Ygor, a grave robber, Wolf successfully reanimates the monster his father originally brought back from the dead. But when several villagers are killed mysteriously, Wolf must find the culprit in order to vindicate his creation, or face the possibility that he may be responsible.

programme.title: Sssssss
programme.desc: A snake scientist (Strother Martin) turns his daughter's (Heather Menzies) boyfriend (Dirk Benedict), his lab helper, into a big cobra.","large":"Short on cash, undergrad David Blake (Dirk Benedict) takes a job working as a lab assistant for snake expert Dr. Carl Stoner (Strother Martin). When Stoner begins giving David a series of antibiotics as a safeguard against snakebites, he at first thinks nothing of it. But gradually David begins to notice curious changes in his body, and his new girlfriend, Dr. Stoner's daughter, Kristina (Heather Menzies), notices them too. Could Dr. Stoner really be trying to turn his assistant into a snake?

programme.title: The Atticus Institute
programme.desc: In the early 1970s, Dr. Henry West creates an institute to find people with supernatural abilities. When Judith Winstead comes to the facility, she exhibits amazing abilities that the military wants to turn into a weapon.

programme.title: Beneath
programme.desc: Coal miners become trapped 600 feet below the surface. As the air grows toxic and time runs out, the crew descends into madness and turns on one another.

programme.title: The Birds II: Land's End
programme.desc: Killer birds infest a seaside town where parents (Brad Johnson, Chelsea Field) take their children for vacation.

programme.title: The Black Castle
programme.desc: An Englishman (Richard Greene) enters an Austrian nobleman's (Stephen McNally) castle, complete with torture chamber and alligator moat.

programme.title: Blood Creek
programme.desc: Two brothers become entangled in a sinister Nazi's occult experiment at an American farmhouse.

programme.title: Captive Wild Woman
programme.desc: A mad doctor (John Carradine) turns an animal trainer's (Milburn Stone) ape into Paula the ape-woman (Acquanetta).

programme.title: Cherry Falls
programme.desc: A serial killer stalking virgins in a small Virginia town targets an idealistic teenager (Brittany Murphy).","large":"A small-town sheriff, Brent Marken (Michael Biehn), discovers the presence of a serial killer in his sleepy hamlet. Since the perpetrator has been targeting only virgins, both male and female, the deaths cause panic in much of the local high school population. Sheriff Marken's daughter, Jody (Brittany Murphy), is among the potential victims, since she has yet to sleep with her boyfriend, Kenny Ascott (Gabriel Mann). Can the lawman stop the killer before he goes after Jody?

programme.title: Cry Wolf
programme.desc: Mysterious murders occur when students (Lindy Booth, Julian Morris) at a prep school invent a story about a serial killer.

programme.title: Cucuy: The Boogeyman
programme.desc: A teenage girl under house arrest discovers that the nightmarish urban legend of the Mexican boogeyman, El Cucuy, is true.

programme.title: The Darkness
programme.desc: A supernatural force terrorizes a couple (Kevin Bacon, Radha Mitchell) and their two children after the young son brings home some mysterious rocks from the Grand Canyon.","large":"Peter Taylor (Kevin Bacon), his wife Bronny and their two children return to Los Angeles after a fun-filled vacation to the Grand Canyon. Strange events soon start to plague the family, including young son Michael's increasingly erratic behavior. The Taylors learn that Michael brought back some mysterious rocks that he discovered inside a cave. Unfortunately, something followed them home as the clan now find themselves in a battle with a supernatural force that preys on their worst fears.

programme.title: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: An all-female crew, on a boat in the middle of nowhere, must deal with an invader on their ship.

programme.title: Dead Man's Eyes
programme.desc: Blinded by acid thanks to his jealous model, an artist (Lon Chaney) needs eye tissue for an operation.

programme.title: Delirium
programme.desc: A man inherits a haunted house after spending time in a mental institution.

programme.title: Dementia 13
programme.desc: A mysterious masked killer terrorizes members of a family at a secluded estate.

programme.title: The Forest
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of her twin sister, a young American encounters the tormented spirits of Japan's mysterious and legendary Aokigahara Forest.","large":"When her twin sister disappears in Japan, a young American named Sara becomes determined to find out what happened to her. Sara's investigation leads her to the legendary Aokigahara Forest, located at the base of Mount Fuji. Accompanied by expatriate Aiden, she enters the mysterious wilderness after being warned to "stay on the path." Her investigation plunges her into a dark world where the angry and tormented souls of the dead prey on those who dare to explore the forest.

programme.title: Games
programme.desc: A mysterious woman (Simone Signoret) in black moves in with married Manhattan thrill-seekers (James Caan, Katharine Ross) and helps one trick the other.","large":"Wealthy and bored, Paul (James Caan) and Jennifer Montgomery (Katharine Ross) while away their hours in a New York City apartment filled with pinball machines and other amusements. The couple's routine is upended when door-to-door saleswoman Lisa Schindler (Simone Signoret) drops by and is suddenly taken ill. The Montgomerys let her spend the night. And soon, the sophisticated Lisa and her hosts embark on a new set of very adult -- and very dangerous -- games.

programme.title: Gone
programme.desc: A televangelist (Gregory Itzin) influences a confrontational man (Billy Burke) motivated by revenge.

programme.title: The Green Inferno
programme.desc: Student activists (Lorenza Izzo, Ariel Levy) crash-land in the Amazon and encounter an indigenous tribe of cannibals who'd like to have them for dinner.","large":"New York college student Justine (Lorenza Izzo), a lawyer's daughter, meets a student activist named Alejandro (Ariel Levy) when he goes on a hunger strike on behalf of underpaid janitors. Smitten, Justine agrees to help Alejandro undertake his next project: to save the Amazon. She soon learns to regret her decision when their plane crashes in the Peruvian jungle and she and the rest of their group are taken captive by a tribe of hungry cannibals.

programme.title: The Guardian
programme.desc: Yuppies (Dwier Brown, Carey Lowell) with a baby hire a nanny (Jenny Seagrove), a druid witch who sacrifices babies to a tree.","large":"Optimistic about their future, well-off parents Kate (Carey Lowell) and Phil (Dwier Brown) hire the pleasant and lovely young Camilla (Jenny Seagrove) to live with them and care for their new baby. Though Camilla seems like an answer to their prayers, she proves to be more than she appears, and a diabolical plot involving the wellbeing of their child is uncovered. The young parents are forced to fight supernatural forces for the life of their vulnerable offspring.

programme.title: The Hitcher II: I've Been Waiting
programme.desc: A psychopathic hitchhiker (Jake Busey) terrorizes a man (C. Thomas Howell) and his girlfriend (Kari Wuhrer) as they take a road trip.","large":"Years after being traumatized by a hitchhiker, Jim Halsey (C. Thomas Howell) is trying to piece his life back together. After being suspended from the police force, he decides to return to Texas to speak with a friend about his problems. He reluctantly agrees to let his girlfriend, Maggie (Kari Wuhrer), join him. As they drive, Maggie lets a stranded driver (Jake Busey) into the car. Halsey becomes suspicious and kicks him out, but the stranger returns, undeterred, to wreak havoc.

programme.title: I Saw What You Did
programme.desc: Two teenage girls, bored while baby-sitting, make prank phone calls, completely unaware one of the people on the other end of the line has just killed his wife and now thinks the girls must be silenced.","large":"Kit (Sarah Lane) and her best friend, Libby (Andi Garrett), are two teenage girls bored while baby-sitting. To pass the time, they make prank phone calls, telling the person on the other end of the line, "I saw what you did, and I know who you are!" It's all in good fun, until they call a man (John Ireland) who just murdered his wife and buried her in the woods. Convinced they actually do know his secret, he becomes determined to find out who they are and silence them forever.

programme.title: Incarnate
programme.desc: Recruited by a Vatican emissary (Catalina Sandino Moreno), an exorcist (Aaron Eckhart) taps into the subconscious mind of a tormented boy (David Mazouz) to free him from demonic possession.","large":"After a single mother witnesses terrifying symptoms of demonic possession in her 11-year-old son (David Mazouz), a Vatican representative calls on wheelchair-bound scientist Dr. Seth Ember (Aaron Eckhart) to rid him of the evil spirit. Driven by a personal agenda rooted in his own tragic past, Ember enters the boy's unconscious mind where he confronts a demon as ferocious as it is ingenious.

programme.title: Karma
programme.desc: When recent college grad Manny has trouble making ends meet, his father-in-law offers him a job evicting delinquent tenants. Manny soon finds himself unleashing a karma demon which stalks him at every turn.

programme.title: The Keeping Hours
programme.desc: A lawyer sees the ghost of his dead son, which leads the man's estranged wife back into his life.

programme.title: Killer High
programme.desc: Sabrina's perfectly planned high school reunion goes south when a monster keeps killing all the guests.

programme.title: Boogeyman
programme.desc: Mike (Eddie McClintock), the town sheriff, has to battle the mythical Boogeyman after boys accidentally release it.

programme.title: Long Time Dead
programme.desc: A genie terrorizes London students (Lara Belmont, Melanie Gutteridge) after they unwittingly summon it with a Ouija.","large":"After a long night of dancing and drinking their way into a haze, roommates Rob (Joe Absolom), Liam (Alec Newman), Stella (Lara Belmont) and Spencer (James Hillier) and a few of their friends duck into a back room of the nightclub to play around with a Ouija board. None of the friends like what the board tells them: they will all die that night. Sure enough, one by one the young friends are slaughtered by a malevolent killer, amid revelations about satanic worship and sacrifice.

programme.title: The New Daughter
programme.desc: A single father (Kevin Costner) is puzzled by his daughter's (Ivana Baquero) weird behavior, which begins soon after he moves his family to a secluded woodland home.

programme.title: Nightmare
programme.desc: A guardian (David Knight) and his lover (Moira Redmond) stage grim scenes to drive a haunted English heiress (Jennie Linden) mad.

programme.title: Not Safe for Work
programme.desc: An office worker becomes trapped in a building with a killer.

programme.title: Phantasm II
programme.desc: Two psychically linked teens (James LeGros, Paula Irvine) cannot escape from the grave-robbing Tall Man of their nightmares.","large":"Years after surviving his encounter with the sinister Tall Man (Angus Scrimm), Mike Pearson (James LeGros), now a mental patient, still has nightmares about the evil gaunt mortician. Upon being released from the institution, Mike and his friend Reggie (Reggie Bannister) set out to track down the Tall Man and end his murderous and macabre practices. Also involved is Liz Reynolds (Paula Irvine), a pretty young woman who has a psychic connection to both Mike and the Tall Man.

programme.title: Psycho IV: The Beginning
programme.desc: Norman Bates (Anthony Perkins) phones a talk show and recalls his life as a 1940s teenager (Henry Thomas) warped by his mother (Olivia Hussey).","large":"Released from a mental institution once again, Norman Bates (Anthony Perkins) calls in to tell his life story to a radio host (CCH Pounder). Norman recalls his days as a young boy living with his schizophrenic mother (Olivia Hussey), and the jealous rage that inspired her murder. In the present, Norman lives with his pregnant wife, Connie (Donna Mitchell), fearing that his child will inherit his split personality disorder, and "Mother" will return to kill again.

programme.title: Rosewood Lane
programme.desc: Sonny Blake (Rose McGowan), a radio talk show therapist, moves back to her childhood home after her father dies. She is shocked to learn her neighbors are terrified of the paperboy (Daniel Ross Owens) who turns out to be a dangerous sociopath.

programme.title: Saint Ange
programme.desc: Strange events haunt a pregnant woman (Virginie Ledoyen) and others at a recently vacated orphanage in the French Alps.","large":"Anna is a cleaning woman who accepts a post at the St. Ange Orphanage. She arrives to confront an unsettling lack of orphans, save for one who acts far too childish for her age. Then the bizarre sights and sounds begin, which seem to elude detection by the only other servant or the gloomy institution's director. Is this all in Anna's mind? Or does something more sinister lurk in the heart of St. Ange?

programme.title: Session 9
programme.desc: Asbestos removal crews start work in an abandoned insane asylum, and strange happenings begin to occur.","large":"A tale of terror when a group of asbestos removal workers start work in an abandoned insane asylum. The complex of buildings looms up out of the woods like a dormant beast. Grand, imposing ... abandoned, deteriorating. The residents of Danvers, Massachusetts steer well clear of the place. But Danvers State Mental Hospital, closed down for 15 years, is about to receive five new visitors...

programme.title: SiREN
programme.desc: A man visits a supernatural nightclub during his bachelor party and inadvertently crosses paths with a dancer who is actually a terrifying, legendary creature.","large":"One week before his wedding day, Jonah and his groomsmen hit the town for a wild night of club hopping and debauchery. The night soon takes a twisted turn for the worse when the group is invited to a seedy underground club. After Jonah frees a seemingly imprisoned dancer, he realizes that the woman he released is actually a terrifying, legendary creature that will stop at nothing to claim her prey.

programme.title: The Skulls
programme.desc: A freshman (Joshua Jackson) joins an elite society that will guarantee him success, but he questions his decision when his reporter roommate dies mysteriously.","large":"For Luke McNamara (Joshua Jackson), an invitation to join the prestigious secret college organization, The Skulls, is a dream come true. But he soon comes to realize just how powerful The Skulls organization really is -- and that the truth, like success, comes at a very high price.

programme.title: The Skulls II
programme.desc: A new inductee (Robin Dunne) into the secret society witnesses a murder at the hands of one of its members.","large":"The Skulls, a secret college society whose influence reaches the highest levels of government and business, recruit Ryan Sommers (Robin Dunne), whose future success now seems all but assured. Then one day he sees one of his fraternity brothers kill a young woman -- a crime that Ryan must keep secret if he is to remain a Skull. While Kelly (Lindy Booth), a good friend, pushes him to follow his conscience, Ryan's girlfriend, Ali (Ashley Lyn Cafagna), surprises him by being against his snitching.

programme.title: Red Dragon
programme.desc: A former FBI agent (Edward Norton) asks Dr. Hannibal Lecter (Anthony Hopkins) for help in stopping a serial killer (Ralph Fiennes) who slaughters families.","large":"Ex-FBI agent Will Graham (Edward Norton) is an expert investigator who quit the Bureau after almost losing his life in the process of capturing the elusive Dr. Lecter (Anthony Hopkins). After a series of particularly grisly murders, Graham soon realizes that the best way to catch this killer, known as the Tooth Fairy, is to find a way to get inside the killer's mind. For Graham, that means confronting his past and facing his former nemesis, the now-incarcerated Lecter.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Kevin has 23 distinct personalities. The 24th is about to be unleashed. The new thriller from M. Night Shyamalan.","large":"Though Kevin has evidenced 23 personalities to his trusted psychiatrist, Dr. Fletcher, there remains one still submerged who is set to materialize and dominate all the others. Compelled to abduct three teenage girls led by the willful, observant Casey, Kevin reaches a war for survival among all of those contained within him -- as well as everyone around him -- as the walls between his compartments shatter.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: Two traveling students (Sophia Bush, Zachary Knighton) pick up a hitchhiker (Sean Bean), unaware that he is a serial killer who intends to pin his crimes on them.","large":"Grace and Jim are a pair of college students on their way to spring break in a 1970 Oldsmobile. Blissfully unaware of the horror that awaits them, they offer a ride to hitchhiker John Ryder, a killer who subsequently terrorizes the couple and implicates them in a grisly slaying.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: A commander (Rhona Mitra) and her crew venture into long-quarantined Scotland to find the counteragent to a deadly virus that has re-emerged in London.","large":"When the first outbreak of the Reaper virus hit Scotland, Eden Sinclair was one of the last to escape containment and had to leave her mother behind. Twenty-five years later, Maj. Eden Sinclair (Rhona Mitra) leads a team back into the hot zone to find a counteragent to the virus, which has re-emerged in London. She and her comrades wage a desperate battle for survival against feral survivors, as they try to prevent it from ushering in a new dark age.

programme.title: Children of Men
programme.desc: When infertility threatens mankind with extinction, a disillusioned bureaucrat becomes the unlikely champion in the fight for the survival of Earth's population.","large":"When infertility threatens mankind with extinction and the last child born has perished, a disillusioned bureaucrat (Clive Owen) becomes the unlikely champion in the fight for the survival of Earth's population; He must face down his own demons and protect the planet's last remaining hope from danger.

programme.title: Hanna
programme.desc: A teenage assassin (Saoirse Ronan) faces startling revelations about her existence and questions about her humanity as she makes her way across Europe to carry out a hit.","large":"Raised by her father (Eric Bana) in the Finnish wilderness, teenage Hanna (Saoirse Ronan) has trained all her life to be the perfect assassin. Her father sends her on a mission, and she stealthily makes her way across Europe while evading agents sent after her by a ruthless operative named Marissa (Cate Blanchett), who once worked with Hanna's father. As she draws closer to her target, Hanna faces startling revelations about her existence and begins to question her humanity.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A band of samurai sets out to avenge the death and dishonor of their master at the hands of a ruthless shogun.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: A woman helps an amnesiac, who has a dangerous past, to dodge assassins as he tries to learn about himself.","large":"A man, salvaged, near death, from the ocean by an Italian fishing boat. When he recuperates, the man suffers from total amnesia, without identity or background, except for a range of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistic skills and self-defense that speak of a dangerous past. He sets out on a desperate search-assisted by the initially rebellious Marie, to discover who he really is, and why he's being lethally pursued by assassins.

programme.title: The Bourne Supremacy
programme.desc: A CIA chief sends a senior operative to take down Jason Bourne when it appears the rogue agent is behind the deaths of two people.","large":"Jason Bourne is living in India when he is framed by Russian agent Kirill for the theft of millions from the CIA; Kirill begins to pursue Bourne, intending to assassinate him -- but while Bourne and his girlfriend, Marie, are on the run, a shot meant for him kills her instead; vowing revenge, Bourne sets out to prove his innocence and bring the culprits to justice, but he has to evade CIA head Pamela Landy, who is convinced he is guilty.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne dodges a ruthless C.I.A. official and his Agents from a new assassination program while searching for the origins of his life as a trained killer.","large":"Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) continues his international quest to uncover his true identity. From Russia to Europe to northern Africa to the United States, he must stay one step ahead of those who would capture or kill him before he has a chance to discover the truth.

programme.title: The Bourne Legacy
programme.desc: The actions of Jason Bourne spell the possible end of secret intelligence programs, so a specially enhanced operative (Jeremy Renner) goes on the run with a research scientist (Rachel Weisz) when it appears that their lives will become forfeit.","large":"When the actions of Jason Bourne spark a fire that threatens to burn down decades of research across a number of secret intelligence agencies, Eric Byer (Edward Norton), the man who built the programs, decides he must sacrifice one of them: Outcome. Aaron Cross (Jeremy Renner), one of Outcome's six agents, and research scientist Marta Shearing (Rachel Weisz) go on the run when Byer targets them for termination. But Cross proves to be a far deadlier target than Byer realizes.

programme.title: The Bourne Identity
programme.desc: A woman helps an amnesiac, who has a dangerous past, to dodge assassins as he tries to learn about himself.","large":"A man, salvaged, near death, from the ocean by an Italian fishing boat. When he recuperates, the man suffers from total amnesia, without identity or background, except for a range of extraordinary talents in fighting, linguistic skills and self-defense that speak of a dangerous past. He sets out on a desperate search-assisted by the initially rebellious Marie, to discover who he really is, and why he's being lethally pursued by assassins.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne dodges a ruthless C.I.A. official and his Agents from a new assassination program while searching for the origins of his life as a trained killer.","large":"Jason Bourne (Matt Damon) continues his international quest to uncover his true identity. From Russia to Europe to northern Africa to the United States, he must stay one step ahead of those who would capture or kill him before he has a chance to discover the truth.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: A band of samurai sets out to avenge the death and dishonor of their master at the hands of a ruthless shogun.

programme.title: Reality Bites
programme.desc: An aspiring filmmaker (Winona Ryder) follows the paths of her friends after they graduate from college in Texas.","large":"After college, Lelaina (Winona Ryder) films a documentary about herself and friends as they flounder in their attempts to forge relationships and begin careers. Vickie (Janeane Garofalo) works retail, has an endless string of one-night stands and awaits the results of her HIV test. Sammy (Steve Zahn) tries to come out to his parents. Lelaina gets involved with yuppie Michael (Ben Stiller) while maintaining a love-hate relationship with Troy (Ethan Hawke), who's undergoing an existential crisis.

programme.title: Dazed and Confused
programme.desc: Assorted teens waste another day of school before getting down to wasting summer in 1976 Austin, Texas.","large":"This coming-of-age film follows the mayhem of a group of rowdy teenagers in Austin, Texas, celebrating the last day of high school in 1976. The graduating class heads for a popular pool hall and joins an impromptu keg party, however star football player Randall Pink Floyd has promised to focus on the championship game and abstain from partying. Meanwhile, the incoming freshmen try to avoid being hazed by the seniors, most notably the sadistic bully Fred O'Bannion.

programme.title: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: An angry confrontation evolves into renewed passion for a divorced couple (Bette Midler, Dennis Farina) at their daughter's (Paula Marshall) wedding.","large":"Molly De Mora (Paula Marshall) is getting married, with her beau being Keith Marks (Jamie Denton), a political hopeful who is running on a family values platform. Molly invites her now-divorced parents, Lilly (Bette Midler) and Dan (Dennis Farina), to the ceremony, only to see them rekindle their romance despite the fact both are remarried. Fearing a tabloid scandal that could damage Keith's candidacy, Molly sets out to stop them, but the pair have run off and aren't so easily tracked.

programme.title: Prime
programme.desc: A recently divorced woman (Uma Thurman) faces numerous challenges when she starts dating the son (Bryan Greenberg) of her therapist (Meryl Streep).","large":"Rafi Gardet (Uma Thurman) is a 37-year-old divorced Catholic businesswoman falling for David (Bryan Greenberg), a 23-year-old Jewish artist. With the help of her therapist, Dr. Lisa Metzger (Meryl Streep), Rafi tries to overcome her insecurities and accept the age difference between her and David. But when Lisa learns more about her client's new love, she realizes that David is her son. As Lisa tries to separate the couple, Rafi and David fear that they may not be right for each other after all.

programme.title: The Dilemma
programme.desc: As an important presentation nears, a business partner (Vince Vaughn) agonizes over whether to tell his associate and friend (Kevin James) that he saw the man's wife out with another guy.","large":"Longtime friends Ronny (Vince Vaughn) and Nick (Kevin James) are partners in an auto-design firm. They are hard at work on a presentation for a dream project that would really launch their company. Then Ronny spots Nick's wife out with another man, and in the process of investigating the possible affair, he learns that Nick has a few secrets of his own. As the presentation nears, Ronny agonizes over what might happen if the truth gets out.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: Former lovers (Vince Vaughn, Jennifer Aniston) live together as hostile roommates when both refuse to move out of their shared condominium.","large":"When Brooke (Jennifer Aniston), an art dealer, and Gary (Vince Vaughn), a tour-bus driver, finally call it quits in their relationship, neither is willing to move out of their shared condo. With their friends suggesting a series of underhanded tactics that fail to get either Brooke or Gary to cave in, the only solution is to become hostile roommates.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: Career plans and other obstacles stand in the way of two lovers (Jason Segel, Emily Blunt) who run into trouble each time they try to set a wedding date.","large":"On their one-year anniversary, sous chef Tom Solomon (Jason Segel) plans to surprise his girlfriend, Violet Barnes (Emily Blunt), with an engagement ring. The lovers do end up engaged, but the fact that the proposal does not go exactly as planned proves to be a harbinger of things to come. Each time they try to set a date, various obstacles stand in their way. As more and more time passes, Tom and Violet begin to wonder if perhaps their marriage is not meant to be.

programme.title: Along Came Polly
programme.desc: Actuary Reuben Feffer finds solace with another woman after his wife cheats on him during their honeymoon.","large":"Actuary Reuben Feffer is so aware of the risks inherent in all situations that he is unable to risk anything. His bride, Lisa Kramer, seems perfect but cheats on him during their honeymoon. Back home in New York City, his best friend, former child star Sandy, urges him to attend a party. There he meets an ex-classmate, Polly Prince, whose spirited ways spark his adoration but confound his neuroses.

programme.title: Trainwreck
programme.desc: A promiscuous magazine writer considers monogamy for the first time when she starts to fall in love with the charming sports doctor she's profiling.","large":"Ever since her father drilled into her head that monogamy isn't realistic, magazine writer Amy has made promiscuity her credo. As much as she enjoys an uninhibited life free of commitment, Amy is really in a rut. While writing a profile about charming and successful sports doctor Aaron Conners, she finds herself actually falling in love for the first time, and what's more, Aaron seems to like her too. Amy starts to wonder if it's time to clean up her act.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: Former lovers (Vince Vaughn, Jennifer Aniston) live together as hostile roommates when both refuse to move out of their shared condominium.","large":"When Brooke (Jennifer Aniston), an art dealer, and Gary (Vince Vaughn), a tour-bus driver, finally call it quits in their relationship, neither is willing to move out of their shared condo. With their friends suggesting a series of underhanded tactics that fail to get either Brooke or Gary to cave in, the only solution is to become hostile roommates.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: Career plans and other obstacles stand in the way of two lovers (Jason Segel, Emily Blunt) who run into trouble each time they try to set a wedding date.","large":"On their one-year anniversary, sous chef Tom Solomon (Jason Segel) plans to surprise his girlfriend, Violet Barnes (Emily Blunt), with an engagement ring. The lovers do end up engaged, but the fact that the proposal does not go exactly as planned proves to be a harbinger of things to come. Each time they try to set a date, various obstacles stand in their way. As more and more time passes, Tom and Violet begin to wonder if perhaps their marriage is not meant to be.

programme.title: Reality Bites
programme.desc: An aspiring filmmaker (Winona Ryder) follows the paths of her friends after they graduate from college in Texas.","large":"After college, Lelaina (Winona Ryder) films a documentary about herself and friends as they flounder in their attempts to forge relationships and begin careers. Vickie (Janeane Garofalo) works retail, has an endless string of one-night stands and awaits the results of her HIV test. Sammy (Steve Zahn) tries to come out to his parents. Lelaina gets involved with yuppie Michael (Ben Stiller) while maintaining a love-hate relationship with Troy (Ethan Hawke), who's undergoing an existential crisis.

programme.title: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: A Chicago man (John Candy) and his family go camping with his obnoxious brother-in-law (Dan Aykroyd) and his family.","large":"It's vacation time for outdoorsy Chicago man Chet Ripley (John Candy), along with his wife, Connie (Stephanie Faracy), and their two kids, Buck (Chris Young) and Ben (Ian Giatti). But a serene weekend of fishing at a Wisconsin lakeside cabin gets crashed by Connie's obnoxious brother-in-law, Roman Craig (Dan Aykroyd), his wife, Kate (Annette Bening), and the couple's two daughters. As the excursion wears on, the Ripleys find themselves at odds with the stuffy Craig family.

programme.title: The Four Seasons
programme.desc: Things change for a middle-class couple (Alan Alda, Carol Burnett) and two other couples they vacation with four times a year.","large":"Jack (Alan Alda) and Kate (Carol Burnett) traditionally go on vacation with their friends every new season. Old friend Nick (Len Cariou) surprises everyone when he arrives not with his wife, Anne (Sandy Dennis), but with his new girlfriend, the much younger Ginny (Bess Armstrong). The group -- all of which had grown to be good friends with Anne -- must come to terms with this unexpected development. Ultimately, they learn to accept Nick's decision, and work to welcome Ginny as a friend.

programme.title: Fletch
programme.desc: An undercover Los Angeles reporter (Chevy Chase) investigates a businessman (Tim Matheson) who wants him to kill him.","large":"A veritable chameleon, investigative reporter Irwin "Fletch" Fletcher (Chevy Chase) might drive his editor (Richard Libertini) up the wall, but he always produces great pieces for the newspaper. When his next story is about the drug trade taking place on the beach, Fletch goes undercover as a homeless man. Unaware of Fletch's true identity, businessman Alan Stanwyk (Tim Matheson) offers Fletch $50,000 to kill him. Intrigued, Fletch decides to unearth the full story behind the offer.

programme.title: Fletch Lives
programme.desc: Reporter Fletch (Chevy Chase) inherits his aunt's Louisiana plantation and wakes up in bed with a dead lawyer.","large":"Irwin "Fletch" Fletcher (Chevy Chase) is one of the best investigative reporters in the country, and he'll need all his skill when he becomes the main suspect in a murder case. After inheriting a Louisiana plantation from a distant relative, Fletch makes the journey from Los Angeles to check it out. When he winds up in bed with a lawyer -- who in turn winds up dead the next morning -- Fletch has to solve the crime before he ends up behind bars for someone else's misdeed.

programme.title: Housesitter
programme.desc: An architect (Steve Martin) has a girlfriend (Dana Delany) who won't move into his house and a dizzy woman (Goldie Hawn) who won't move out.","large":"Architect Newton Davis (Steve Martin) is distraught when his girlfriend, Becky (Dana Delany), spurns his proposal and refuses to move into the lavish house he designed for her. Davis, who cannot imagine himself living alone in the house, shares his tale of woe with Gwen (Goldie Hawn), a dishonest waitress he thinks doesn't speak English. Complications arise when Davis, on the brink of reconciliation with Becky, discovers that Gwen has moved into the couple's soon-to-be dream home.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: A middle-class man (Steve Martin), his wife (Mary Steenburgen), his father and a divorcee (Dianne Wiest) try to be good parents.","large":"Perfectionist Gil Buckman (Steve Martin) struggles with the deficiencies of his children, thinking they reflect poorly on his parenting -- and Gil's siblings only add to the stress of his life. One of his sisters (Dianne Wiest) faces difficulty when her teenage daughter (Martha Plimpton) becomes pregnant. Another (Harley Jane Kozak) clashes with her husband (Rick Moranis) when she asks for more children. Gil's immature brother (Tom Hulce) turns up as well, with a young son he can barely handle.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: Joliet Jake (John Belushi) and Elwood Blues (Dan Aykroyd), brothers on a mission from God, bomb around Chicago in an old police car, reuniting their hot band.","large":"After his release from prison, Jake (John Belushi) reunites with his brother, Elwood (Dan Aykroyd) -- collectively known as the "Blues Brothers." Jake's first task is to save the orphanage the brothers grew up in from closing, by raising $5,000 to pay back taxes. The two are convinced they can earn the money by getting their old band back together. However, after playing several gigs and making a few enemies, including the police, the brothers face daunting odds to deliver the money on time.

programme.title: Undercover Brother
programme.desc: A low-rent private detective poses as a preppy nerd in order to foil a plot by conspirators.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When actress Nellie Jefferson joins the wagon train, her incessant demands for special treatment grate on Hale and Hawks, but Wooster grows completely smitten with Nellie.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A blind man, his sister and young son meet up with the wagon train on the trail; they are trying to find a train that will let them travel to California; Saul is a qualified doctor and has hopes of starting a blind school.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Polish immigrant Joe Muharich tries to befriend and hopefully straighten out Johnny Kamen, a brash young man who doesn't take well to anyone giving orders to him.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: With his clever tall tales, old prospector Henry Shannon talks Charlie Wooster into coming with him to search for a gold mine; when Hawks finds out about this, he rides out after the two men, along with Shannon's grandson.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jesse comes upon a starving drifter who thinks Jess is going to shoot him; Jess and Slim offer the drifter a job.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess is put to the test when he is asked by the Army to hunt down a thief who's stolen a payroll delivery -- but the thief is an old friend who once saved Jess' life.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim is taken as a substitute for a condemned man by a farmer who is desperate for the $100 bounty to be paid upon delivery.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Jess rides shotgun on a stage carrying an Army payroll, robbers take the cash and leave the passengers stranded in the desert.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: An old outlaw, hoping to spend his last years in peace in Laramie, asks for Slim's help in clearing his name.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Tina hopes Chuck Evans can help her escape from her dull life as a teacher.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Maxon and Hardie try to prevent a boy from becoming an outlaw.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie and his prisoner fight off gunmen out to kill them both.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: After Billy Trent murders a townsman, Hardie escorts him out of town on the stage with men in pursuit.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Sam Heffridge, a gunman, has been bailed out of jail by a robber seeking an ally in New Orleans where Hardie and Jeb are visiting; Hardie soon learns about a plot against Wells Fargo.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A driver's wife and child are kidnapped.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: When a friendly wager involving a beautiful woman turns to murder, Hardie investigates a stagecoach robbery after the woman turns up with amnesia.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Two sideshow hypnotists, The Great Reardon and his wife, use their powers to fleece a gold-mine owner after Hardie hires them to serve as entertainment at a Wells Fargo celebration.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: When two ex-con brothers kidnap the man who put them in jail, Hardie investigates.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Will, his mother, and his younger sister join the wagon train under a false surname after many towns forced them out due to the terrible actions of one family member.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: An Army general announces he is taking over the wagon train; he's requiring all members to act as soldiers in helping him rescue a trapped cavalry garrison of 120 men who are otherwise likely to be murdered by hostile Utes.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint visits Elanor Culhane, an old flame of his once married to a notorious gunman.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Bill Hawks helps an Italian immigrant retrieve his village's beloved chalice when a couple of drifters steal it.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: After losing one of her children in an accident, a woman feels bitter over the wagon train and plans to turn back east, while her husband wishes to continue west.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint comes across four survivors of an Indian massacre, the two Ellison sisters and two Carder brothers.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Charlie Wooster's cooking goes from awful to god-awful; Hale demotes him and promotes his Chinese assistant to the train's chief cook.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A dying Spanish nobleman asks Flint to impersonate Don Alvarado to claim the inheritance for the rest of his family.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Chris Hale faces a dilemma, he must hire Capt. Dan Brady as a trail scout or lose his government mail contract, or love Flint, his right-hand man.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Kitty Albright is a nurse who joins the wagon train; she soon becomes concerned about the people's poor sanitation habits.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint is scouting and meets an all-female wagon train; Maud is the wagon mistress, and she cannot be convinced that it isn't safe for them to cross Indian country alone.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Selena Hartnell is a bounty hunter looking for a murderer on the run.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess gets a call for help from his old partner, Dixie Howard, who once saved Jess' life, but the man Jess once knew has changed.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: With an increase of Sioux attacks on the stage, Slim suggests repairing an old road as an alternate route.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim Sherman represents the stage line in a contract with an outlaw's widow, who is also a secret investigator.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess come to the aid of a family of entertainers whose wagon breaks down as they travel East; unbeknownst to all, the family is being followed by a group of men who think the family is transporting opium.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Slim and Jess are in dire need of a housekeeper, so the judge will allow them to keep Mike on the ranch.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie tracks two bandits fleeing to Mexico with $10,000 belonging to Wells Fargo.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Banker Les Caldwell attempts to steal $100,000 from his own bank; Jim Hardie falls in love.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie guards a stagecoach carrying gold.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim investigates killing during robbery.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie goes undercover to the town of Alder Gulch to investigate stagecoach robberies.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim is sent to Moose Creek, Canada, to identify the corpse of an outlaw only he has seen, but the man was killed with a shotgun blast to the face, which makes him hard to identify; a woman claims the body is her brother's body.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: The son of a dead man accused of a stage coach robbery finds an empty strongbox in the attic and hopes that Jim Hardie can help him uncover the real thieves.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie gives a job to the son of a former employee who was fired.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie tries to prevent a lynching when a town's hard cases accuse a Basque sheepherder of the abduction of a young girl.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim goes undercover as a trainee for Wells Fargo, to try and find out who is supplying renegade Indians with the guns they are using on their murderous raids.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie isn't pleased when a man and beautiful woman insist on becoming passengers on the stagecoach he will use.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie is ordered to infiltrate Sam Bass' gang so that he can learn where they hole up between raids.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie is called in to investigate what happened to a long overdue stagecoach; among passengers were the son of a wealthy rancher and his fiancée.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie joins a group of passengers aboard a stagecoach that includes a woman and her son, a reporter and an outlaw.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: When Jesse James and his gang are suspected of robbing a bank in Missouri, Jim Hardie goes undercover to try to find the outlaw.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Hale rescues Clementine Jones after the citizens of Cinnabar throw her out of town as an undesirable.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A deathbed wish, Flint's foster mother sends him to find her son Artie, who Flint has struggled to get along with; when Flint finds him, he's been questionably elected mayor.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Lord Bruce Saybrook, London millionaire, takes his family out west on a hunting trip hoping to repair his relationships; they learn more about each other than expected.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Lizabeth Ann Calhoun asks permission to join the train so she can avoid the advances of a young man she claims is in love with her.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint goes undercover in a gang.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Bettina May leads three generations of her family across the plains; members of the train become concerned with her over-bearing nature towards her family.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Charlie adopts a buffalo after tending to its injuries and forming a bond with it.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When a young man is found wounded along the trail, he claims that he was attacked and left for dead.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Duke is sent to guide back three wagons that fell behind the train, when he finds them however, he encounters resistance from three men with them.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: In an effort to expose a swindler posing as a traveling preacher, Duke allows himself to be talked into one of his schemes.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Jeff Hartfield fears his sister's new boyfriend, Dallas, a threatening man who believes Jeff knows the whereabouts of a hidden stash of money.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: A judge notorious for going strictly by the book in his effort to bring order to the frontier faces the ultimate test when his son finds himself in court.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When Daisy takes Jess to the dentist in Cheyenne, Jess is deputized to transport a prisoner back to Laramie.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: After his son is killed, Carl Sanford and his surviving sons decide to use the Sherman Ranch to exact their own brand of justice on the killer as he's being transported to prison.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: Jess is unwittingly riding shotgun on a payroll stage that has been rigged to wreck; after the robbery, Jess trails the bandits to Billings.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: An ex-con from Slim's past shows up on the ranch, seeking assistance from Slim, who grudgingly agrees to help.

programme.title: Laramie
programme.desc: When a lame horse forces Jess to stop at the Tolliver holdings, he winds up a hostage of the Dyer gang.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie is called to investigate when a Wells Fargo agent dies and a large sum of money is determined to be missing from the man's office.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Outlaw Belle Starr and her gang rob a train on which Jim Hardie is a passenger, and he tries to lure her from hiding by tempting her with a prominent racehorse.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: A rookie outlaw holds up the stage carrying cash that Jim is waiting for, prompting Jim to go off looking for the thief, but he finds he needs the criminal's help when the two must evade an Indian attack.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim joins a father who's searching for his missing son in the Superstition Mountains -- an area held sacred by the Apaches.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: As the only witness to a robbery, Hardie is targeted by the robber's partner.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim goes on the hunt for a band of robbers that is targeting Pony Express riders.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Jim Hardie is sent to negotiate a right of way for their stagecoaches through Sam Brundage's property.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo
programme.desc: Hardie investigates a stagecoach holdup where white men disguised as Indians kill the driver and the guard and leave a lady for dead.

programme.title: Tales of Wells Fargo

programme.title: Partner
programme.desc: In the romantic comedy film "Partner", we meet Prem, a self-proclaimed love guru who assists people in finding their soulmates. Despite his expertise, Prem's own love life is in disarray until he befriends Bhaskar, a carefree and fun-loving man. The two become business partners and friends, and Prem coaches Bhaskar on the intricacies of romance to help him win over Naina. However, their journey is filled with hilarious hurdles and misunderstandings that test their friendship and love lives.

programme.title: Gandhi My Father
